Prichard, Henry, s. William, of Manorbyer, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1661-2, aged 18.
Rees, Thomas, s. Thomas, of St. Bride Major, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 July, 1661, aged 17.
Walbeoffe, Charles, s. Charles, of Llanhamlach, co. Brecon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 July, 1661, aged 15.
Jones, Edward, s. "John Thomas", of Nerquis, co. Flint, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 July, 1661, aged 21.
Lewis, David, s. D., of Devynnock, co. Brecon, pleb. pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 Feb., 1661-2, aged 18.
Poole, Robert, s. Richard, "of Keynest Mervin," pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 Feb., 1661-2, aged 20.
Wynne, John, s. Robert, of Nerquis, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 July, 1661, aged 17.
Williams, Maurice, cler. fil. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 May, 1661.

Jones, John, s. Matthew, of Pentyrch, co. Glamorg., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 June, 1662, aged 17; B.A. 1666, fellow, M.A. 1670, B.C.L. 1673, D.C.L. 1677, licenced to practice medicine 25 June, 1678, and practiced at Windsor; licenced 29 Aug., 1678, to marry Mary Starkey, of New Windsor, Berks, spinster; licentiate of the college of physicians, 1687, chancellor of the diocese of Llandaff 1691; died 1709. See Ath. iv. 722; Rawl. ii. 18; London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster; & Munk's Roll, i. 476.

Powell, Hugh, s. Thomas, of St. Davids, co. Brecon, pleb. p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1662, aged 17, B.A. 1666; M.A. from Jesus Coll., Cambridge, 1670, rector of Llansaintffraid, co. Brecon, 1669, vicar of Cefnllys, co. Radnor, 1681, prebendary of Brecon 1692, canon and precentor of St. Davids 1697, until his death 2 June, 1717; will dated 27 May, and proved 19 Sept., 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Owen, John, s. Arthur, of Johnstone, co. Pembroke, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 June, 1662, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1664 (his father of Orielton), M.P. co. Pembroke, Nov., 1678—Jan., 1678-9. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Jones, Robert, s. Humphrey, of Llaneingar, co. Carnarv., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1662, aged 23; perhaps B.A. from Hart Hall 15 June, 1666, and rector of Penmorfa, co. Carnarvon, 1670. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Glover, George, s. Peter, of Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1662, aged 18; B.A. from Balliol Coll. 28 Jan., 1667-8, vicar of Middleton, als. Longparish, Hants, 1670. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Davies, Thomas, s. Athanasius, of Tredonnoc, co. Monmouth, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Oct., 1662, aged 17; B.A. 1666, rector of Kemeys Inferior, co. Monmouth, 1667. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Anwill, Maurice, s. William, of 'Trausfynydd, co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 May, 1662, aged 18; of Lincoln's Inn 1663. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Jervis, Humphrey, s. Richard, of Llanrhayader, co. Denbigh, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 June, 1662, aged 18; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 1666.
Pugh, Morgan, s. Hugh Lewis, "Kilie Ceretie" (Cilau-Aeron, co). Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1662, aged 18; brother of Leoline.
Thomas, William, s. Fran., of Berriew, co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1662-3, aged 17, B.A. 1666, M.A. 1674.
Dyos, Edward, 'serviens,' s. Th., of Guilsfield, co. Montgomery, pleb., p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Oct., 1662, aged 16.
Maurice, John, s. Theodore, of Llanrhaiadr, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1662, aged 18, B.A. 1666.
Humphreys, Robert (Humffreyes), s. William, of Merioneth town, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 July, 1662, aged 18.
Clarkson, William, s. William, of St. Asaph, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 July, 1662, aged 19.
Hughes, Richard, s. William, of Oswestry, Salop, pleb. pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1662-3, aged 18.
Jones, Peter, s. Thomas, of Caermarthen town, pleb. pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 July, 1662, aged 23.
Lloyd, Joshua, s. Andr., of Aston, Salop, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1662-3, aged 16.

Williams, William, s. Dav., of Cawedy (Cwmdu), co. Brecon, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 15, B.A. 14 Feb., 1666-7, M.A. 1669; vicar of Llanarvon Vawr 1670, and of Langorse 1670, and of Llanynis, (all) co. Brecon, 1676, rector of Walwyns Castle 1678, and of Haverfordwest St. Martin's, (both) co. Pembroke, 1687. See Fasti, ii. 308; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Price, Owen, s. Owen, of Llanloydach, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1663, aged 16; perhaps of Gray's Inn, gent., licenced 6 March, 1670-1, to marry Anne Williams, of St. Giles-in-theFields, spinster; brother of Thomas same date. See London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster.

Davies, Nehemiah, s. Matthew, of Bishopston, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 16; B.A. 1667, M.A. 22 Jan., 1683-4, rector of Mongewell, Oxon, 1671, vicar of Compton, Berks, 1684, probably father of the next named. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Huxley, Thomas, s. Francis, (subs.) of Brosely, Salop, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 17; B.A. 1666, M.A. 1669, proctor 1674, B.D. 1677; rector of Blunsdon St. Andrew, Wilts, 1677, of Woodchurch, Kent, 1684; brother of John 1658. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Coytmor, Richard, s. Rich., of Criccieth, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1663, aged 20; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 9 March, 1664-5, vicar of Whitford, Flints, 1668, rector of Aber, co. Carnarvon, 1679. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Probert, Henry, s. George, of Penalt, co. Monmouth, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1664, M.P. Monmouth 1698-1700, his father also M.P. 1661-77. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Watkins, Henry, s. Henr., of Boughrood, co. Radnor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 16, B.A. 14 Feb., 1666-7, M.A. 1673; vicar of Devynnock, co. Brecon, 1680. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Price, Thomas, s. Owen, of 'Llanloydach,' co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1663, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn 1665; brother of Owen same date. See Foster's Gray's Inn Register.
Wogan, Lewis, s. Abr., of Boulston, co. Pembroke, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 June, 1663, aged 16; one of these names M.P. Pembroke (Feb.) 1712-14. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.
Lewis, Godwin, s. 'Lewis Jenkin,' of Crayghy, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1663, aged 16; rector of Neath, co. Glamorgan, 1671. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, David, s. Th., of Griffenstone, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 22; bar.-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1669. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Mansell, Thomas, s. Bussey, of Briton Ferry, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1663, aged 15; buried in Westminster Abbey 23 Dec., 1684. See Chester, 212.
Carne, Edward, s. Edw(ard), of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 May, 1663, aged 19; of Cowbridge, alderman, died 2 Dec., 1722, aged 81.
Jones, Thomas, s. William, of Cocheston, co. Pembroke, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 15; B.A. 14 March, 1666-7, M.A. 1670.
Price, Thomas, s. Leyson, of Margam, co. Glamorgan, pleb. p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1663, aged 17.
Phillips, James, s. Tho., of Manernawler, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1663, aged 17.
Evans, Richard, s. Richard, of Halkin, co. Flint, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 July, 1663, aged 19.
Powell, Thomas, s. Th., of Llandow, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1663; aged 15.
Gwyn, Edward, s. Th., of Pentre Court, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 16.
Wynne, Thomas, s. Owen, of Glascoed, co. Carnarvon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1663, aged 19.
Palmer, Thomas, s. Joh., of Dungan, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 20.
Jones, Kenrick, s. David, of Surton, co. Flint., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1663, aged 18.
Jones, John, s. Th., of Caermarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1663, aged 15; B.A. 1667.

Maurice, Henry, "ser." s. Tho., of Llangristiolis. co. Anglesey, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric, 20 May, 1664, aged 16; B.A. 28 Jan., 1667-8, fellow, M.A. 1671, B.D. 1679, D.D. 1683; Margaret professor of divinity 1691, chaplain to Sir Leoiine Jenkins, and to archbishop Sancroft, rector of Chevening, Kent, 1681-5, sinecure rector of Llandrillo-ynRhos, co. Denbigh, 1684, treasurer of Chichester 1681, rector of Newington, Oxon, 1684, and canon of Worcester July, 1691. until his death 30 Oct., 1691. See Gutch, i. 588; Ath. iv. 326; Thomas, St. Asaph, 551; Hearne, ii. 60; & Lansdowne MS. 987, ff. 129, 147.

Lucas, Richard, s. Rich. of Presteign, co. Radnor, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1664-5, aged 16; B.A. 1668, M.A. 1672 (incorporated at Cambridge 1677), B. and D.D. 1691, became blind as his father before him, master of Abergavenny free school, rector of St. Stephen's, Coleman Street, 1678, lecturer of St. Olave, Southwark, 1684, canon of Westminster 1697, until he died, 29 June, 1715; buried in Westminster Abbey. See Ath. iv. 722; Rawl. i. 215, iii. 376, xxi. 10; Chester's West. Abbey Reg. 283; Lansdowne MS. 987, f. 384; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Roberts, Nicholas, s. Rich., of St. Davids, co. Pembroke, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1664-5, aged 19, B.A. 1668; M.A. from Christ Church 1671, vicar of Llandewi-Velfrey 1673, and rector of Nolton, co. Pembroke, 1678, and of Llandewi Aberath, co. Cardigan, 1687, and rector of Llanvalteg, co. Carmarthen, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Vaughan, Cadwallader, s. John, of Glasvryn, co. Carnarvon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 March, 1664-5, aged 17, B.A. 1668, M.A. 1671; vicar of Belton, and rector of Osgarthorpe, co. Leicester, 1679; father of John 1703, and of Thomas 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Thomas, William, s. Lewis, of Kemeys-Inferior, co. Monmouth, pleb. (subs. "paup."). Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 18, B.A. 1667; rector of Kemeys-Inferior 1668, and of St. Bride's als Llansaintfraid, co. Monmouth, 1670. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Powell, William, s. John, of Llanvetherine, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1664, aged 16; B.A. 1668, M.A. 1672, vicar of LlangattageGlening, co. Monmouth, 1668, and rector of Llanwenarth, co. Monmouth, 1670. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Robertes, Robert, s. William, of St. Asaph, Flints, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 18; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 1668; one of these names vicar of Conway 1673, and rector of Llanfairfechan, co. Carnarvon, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Watkins, David, s. Watkin William, of Llanddau, Brecon, pleb. p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 18, B.A. 1667, M.A. 1676; rector of Michaelstone, alias Llanmihangel-juxta-Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, 1671. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Taylor, Benjamin, s. Richard, of the Heath, parish of Badger, Salop, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1664-5, aged 19; vicar of Madeley 1672, and rector of Badger, Salop, 1667; father of Jeremiah 1701. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Evans, Daniel, s. Tho., of Peterwell, co. Cardigan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 17; B.A. 1669; possibly a student of Gray's Inn 1671, as of Lampeter, co. Cardigan, gent. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.

Williams, John, s. Roger, of Combe, Flints, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 18, B.A. 30 March, 1669; vicar of Cwm 1668, and rector of Llandeglos, Flints, 1677. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Jones, James, s. John, of Mothvey, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 March, 1664-5, aged 17; one of these names vicar of Llansadwrn, co. Carmarthen, 1673. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, Thomas, s. Morgan, of Llanbalk, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1664-5, aged 15; B.A. 1668, M.A. 1671, probationary fellow; died 2 Nov., 1673. See Gutch, i. 590.
Weld, Ralph, s. Peter, of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 May, 1664, aged 17, B.A. 28 Jan., 1667-8, M.A. 1670; rector of Saxham, Suffolk, 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, Lewis, s. Grif., of Llanwnda, co. Carnarv., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 18; B.A. 1667, rector of Llandwrog, co. Carnarvon, 1671. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Rumsey, Henry, s. John, of Wolves Newton, co. Monmouth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 March, 1664-5, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn 1667. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Lloyd, John, s. John, of Kenswyn (?), co. Merioneth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 15; student of Inner Temple 1664. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Randalph, Richard, s. "Rand Owen," of Penman, parish Denio, co. Carnarvon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 19; brother of Humphrey 1662.
Rickards, Samuel, s. Fr., of Presteign, co. Radnor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1664-5, aged 17; B.A. 1668, M.A. 1671.
Whiston, Thomas, s. John, of Kilsall, Salop, pleb. pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1664, aged 18, B.A. 28 Jan., 1667-8.
Lloyd, John, s. Lewis, of Llangunnock (Llangynicke), co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 April, 1664, aged 15.
Lewis, George, "ser.," s. Ph., of Llanboydy, co. Carmarthen, pleb. pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 May, 1664, aged 17.
Thomas, Edward, s. "Thomas Jones," of Spytty, co. Denbigh, pleb. p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1664, aged 19.
Rowland, Thomas, s. Rol. Thomas, of Llanundha, co. Carnarvon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 17.
Vaughan, Stephen, s. Hugh, of Llansanffraid, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1664-5, aged 18.
Copner, Edmund, s. Edm., of Brecon (town), pleb., p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1664, aged 18; B.A. 1668.
Jones, William, s. Tho., of Rhuddland, co. Flint, pleb., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 16.
Blome, John s. Rich, of Cwm Guilly, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 16.
Go(o)dwyn, Scudamore, s. Charles, of "Monm," minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1664-5, aged 19.
Sontley, Robert, s. Robert, of Sontley, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 May, 1664, aged 18.
Evatt, Edward, s. Edw., of Northrop, co. Flint, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1664, aged 15.

Humphreys, Humphrey, s. Richd., of Llanihangel, co. Merioneth, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1665-6, aged 17; B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672, B.D. 1679, D.D. 1682; born at Penrhyn Daûdraeth, co. Merioneth, 24 Nov., 1648, chaplain to Dr. Humphrey Lloyd, bishop of Bangor, rector of Llanfrothen, co. Merioneth, 1670, of Trawsfynydd, co. Merioneth, 1672, of Criccieth als Merthir, co. Carnarvon, 1677, and of Llaniestyn, co. Carnarvon, 1680, and of Eastyn or Queenhope, Flints, 1685, canon, dean of Bangor 1680, bishop 1689, and of Hereford 1701 until he died 20 Nov., 1712. See Lansdowne MS. 987, f. 340; Ath. iv. 896; Foster's Index Eccl.; & D.N.B.

Williams, John, s. Tho., of Swansea, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1665-6, aged 17, B.A. 19 Oct., 1669, M.A. 1672; vicar of Rosemarket, co. Pembroke, 1677, and perhaps beneficed in Glamorganshire; canon 1678, and archdeacon of Brecon 1681-4, archdeacon of Cardigan 1681-1701; father of Blome 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lougher, John, s. Watkin, of Tythegstone, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1665-6, aged 19; B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672, rector of Sully 1670, vicar of St. Donats 1673, of Penmark, and of Llantrissaint (all co. Glamorgan), 1684, canon of Llandaff 1679. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Rogers, Henry, s. "Roger Richards," of Llandissilio, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 June, 1665, aged 18; B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672, vicar of Glasbury, co. Brecon, 1684, rector of Cusop, co. Hereford, 1687, and canon of Hereford 1703, until his death in 1709. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Thomas, Griffin, s. "Thomas John," of Cadoxtonjuxta-Neath, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1665-6, aged 21, B.A. 12 Feb., 1671-2, M.A. 1672 (as Griffith); vicar of Llanedarn, co. Glamorgan, 1671, and canon of Llandaff 1674. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgan, Christopher, s. Walter, of Abergavenny, co. Monmouth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1665-6, aged 20, B.A. 1669 (as Morgans); vicar of Magor 1670, rector of Kemeys 1671, and of Roggiett (all co. Monmouth) 1672. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Maddocks, Philip, s. Tho., of St. Andrews, co. Glamorgan, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1665, aged 17; rector of Rode, Somerset, 1681, and of St. Michael (alias Michaelstone), with St. Bride super Ely, co. Glamorgan, 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Waters, Edmund, s. Dav., of Pile, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1665-6, aged 17, B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672; rector of Llantrithyd 1670, and of Llangam, co. Glamorgan, 1671, until his death in 1704. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Lewis, Charles, s. Charles, of Abergavenny, co. Monmouth, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1665, aged 17, B.A. 1669; perhaps vicar of Llandevalley, co. Brecon, 1669, and rector of Llanfoist, co. Monmouth, 1670. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Roberts, David, s. "Rob. Davids," of Pennantlliw, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1665, aged 18, B.A. 1670; perhaps of Swincombe, Oxon, clerk, licenced (V.G.) 6 Nov., 1683, to marry Prudence Jemmett, of same, widow.

Butler, John, s. John, of St. Bride's Major, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1665-6, aged 19; B.A. 1669, rector of Cadoxtonjuxta-Barry, co. Glamorgan, 1671. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Philipps, Walter, s. Joh., of Llangan, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1665-6, aged 16; B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672; vicar of Llanboidy, co. Carmarthen, 1672. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Vaughan, Thomas, s. Ph(ilip), of Hordley, Salop, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1665, aged 16, B.A. 1669, M.A. 22 Feb., 1671-2; died at Oxford 1674; brother of Philip 1675.
Stokes, John, s. Anth., of Roche, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 June, 1665, aged 17; brother of Nicholas 1661, and father of Peregrine.
Prichard, William, s. Richard Anwill, of Bathilelart (Beddgelert, co. Carnarvon), pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Feb., 1665-6, aged 18.
Watkins, John, s. John, of Llantillio Crossenny, co. Monmouth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1665, aged 19.
Phillipps, George, s. Rob., of Llangunnor, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1665, aged 17.
Davies, Rowland, s. Henr., of Llandyfrydogh, co. Anglesey, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1665, aged 17.
Lloyde, Richard, s. Erasmus, of Llanhrystid, co. Cardigan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1665, aged 18.
Lloyd, Evan, s. John, of Cwerfin, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1665, aged 19.
Gwillim, William, s. William, of Monmouth, pleb. pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1665, aged 17.

Williams, (Sir) John, s. Trevor, of Llangibby, co. Monmouth, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 May, 1666, aged 15; 2nd bart.; student of Gray's Inn 1668, and perhaps a barrister 1680; M.P. Monmouth Feb., 1688-9, to Feb., 1689-90, co. Monmouth in 4 parliaments, 1698, until he died s.p. Nov., 1704, See Foster's Judges and Barristers & Parliamentary Dictionary.

Cary, Thomas, s. 'Shershaw,' of Bristol, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Nov., 1666, aged 17; B.A. 1670, M.A. 1673, vicar of St. Philip and St. James, Bristol, 1675, canon of Bristol 1693, vicar of Olveston, co. Gloucester, 1698, and of All Saints, Bristol, 1701, died in 1711, father of William 1705. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Smith, Thomas (Smyth), s. William, of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1666, aged 15, B.A. 1670, M.A. 1673, B.D. 1680; rector of Llanferres, co. Denbigh, 1678, vicar of Chirk 1681, rector of Marchwiel 1691 (his father vicar of Wrexham 1661-84); father of Richard 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jeffreys, James, s. John, of Acton, co. Denbigh. gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1666, aged 17; B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672, B.D. 1679, D.D. 1683, canon of Canterbury 1682, rector and vicar of Eastchurch, Kent, 1684, rector of Chartham 1686, until his death 4 Sept., 1689; brother of Sir George. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Howell, Walter, s. Maur., of Kidwelly, co Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 March, 1666-7, aged 16; B.A. 1670, fellow, M.A. 1673, B.D. 1680, rector of Killrhedin, co. Pembroke, 1683; will at Oxford proved 27 Jan., 1696. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Roberts, Thomas, s. Henr., of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, pleb., p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Nov., 1666, aged 17; B.A. 1670, M.A. 1674, rector of Llanilid als. St. Juliet 1672, and of Peterstonesuper-Ely, co. Glamorgan, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Williams, John, s. John, of Cwmdu, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1666-7, aged 18; student Gray's Inn 1667, and perhaps a barrister 1680; brother of Edward 1671, and of Thomas 1673. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Cradocke, Morgan, s. Ph(ilip), of Llanrhidian, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 July, 1666, aged 17; B.A. 1670, of Cheriton and CwrtRhyd-hir, co. Glamorgan, a deputy seneschal of Penmark Manor, 2 James I., 1604.

Owens, Maurice, s. "Owen Evans," of Llangulling, co. Montgomery, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1666, aged 18; B.A. from Christ Church 1670 (subs. as "Maris"), rector of Montgomery 1676. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Powell, William, s. William, of Mustly, Flints, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1666, aged 16; (subscribes serviens), B.A. 1669, M.A. 1672; one of these names beneficed in Berkshire. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Powell, Francis, s. Tho., of Cantriff, co. Brecon, doctoris. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 March, 1666-7, aged 17, B.A. 1670; incorporated at Cambridge 1673, and M.A. from Jesus Coll., Cambridge, 1673.
Hughes, Henry, s. Rob., of Llandegnan, Anglesey, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 May, 1666, aged 19; B.A. 18 Jan., 1669-70, M.A. 1673; one of these names beneficed in Kent. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Henry, s. "William Jones," of Cadoxtonjuxta-Neath, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 May, 1666, aged 22 (subscribes "serviens"), B.A. 18 Jan., 1669-70, M.A. 1674.
Jones, Thomas, s. Humphr., of London, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 May, 1666, aged 17; possibly student of Inner Temple 1667, as of London, gen. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Richards, John, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 June, 1666, B.A. 1670, M.A. 1673; perhaps rector of Monks Horton, and vicar of Bradbourne, Kent, 1676. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, Evan, s. Bevis, of Carreg-y-pennill, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 May, 1666, aged 17; student of Inner Temple 1668. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Mathews, Edward, s. Dav., of Llandaff, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1666, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1668. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Kemeys, George, s. Nic., of Keven Mably, co. Glamorg., bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Nov., 1666, aged 18; half-brother of Charles 1632.
Payne, Richard, s. Rich., of Whitchurch, Salop, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 July, 1666, aged 16; B.A. 1670, M.A. 20 March, 1672-3.
Davies, Leyson (Lison), s. 'David Philip,' of Cadoxtonjuxta-Neath, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 May, 1666, aged 19.
Watkins, Robert, s. Evan, of Cathedin, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 May, 1666, aged 16, B.A. 18 Jan., 1669-70.
Lewis, Thomas, s. "Lewis Edwards," of Trevegloes, co. Montgomery, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1666-7, aged 20.
Wynn, Evan, s. Joh., of Gumfryn, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1666-7, aged 17, B.A. 1670.
Bassett, John, y.s Richard, of Beaupré, co. Glamorgan, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 Feb., 1666-7, aged 18.
Williams, Edward, s. Edw., of "Froadgreck," co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1666-7, aged 17.
Vaughan, Walter, s. Tho., of Pytinglasse, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1666-7, aged 17.
Vaughan, Walter, s. Joh., of Llanelly, co. Carnarvon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Nov., 1666, aged 17.
Bulkeley, Richard, s. Rol., of Berthamall, Anglesey, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Nov., 1666, aged 16.
Evans, Hugh, s. Joh., of Rhayader, co. Radnor, pleb., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Nov., 1666, aged 19.
Bowen, Henry, s. Henry, of Haverfordwest, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1666, aged 18.

Okes, John, s. William, of Broseley, Salop, pleb. p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1667, aged 17; B.A. from Oriel Coll. 1671; M.A. from St. Mary Hall 26 Feb., 1673-4; licenced 2 May, 1677, to marry Mary Hutchings, of St. Dunstan-inthe-West, widow; vicar of Shinfield, Berks, 1676-1723; father of the next. See Fasti, ii. 335; London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Wynne, Peter, s. Joh., of Rylaffnoyd, co. Flints, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1667, aged 17, B.A. 24 Jan., 1670-1, M.A. 1673; vicar of Llanfair-Dyffryn-Clwyd, co. Denbigh, 1672, and of Eglwyssail 1676, and of Llandegvan, (both) co. Anglesea, 1681; canon of St. Asaph 1678, vicar of Wrexham 1684; brother of Edward 1675. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Thomas, 857.

Phillippes, Thomas, s. Tho., of Builth, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 May, 1667, aged 16; B.A. 24 Jan., 1670-1, M.A. 1674, rector of Cregina, Radnor, 1672-91, prebendary of collegiate church of Brecon 1682, vicar of Llansantffraid 1682-91, and rector of Aberedw, co. Radnor, 1691-1708; father of Thomas 1701. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Lloyd, Lewis (? Floyd or Flood), s. Rob., of Festiniog, co. Merioneth, pleb., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1667, aged 19; one of these names vicar of Caerleon, of Whiston, and of Christchurch alias Trinity, co. Monmouth, 1663. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Philips, Meredith, s. Philip Williams, of Devynnock, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 March, 1667-8, aged 19; B.A. 1671, M.A. 10 March, 1675-6; rector of Penderyn 1680, and vicar of Llywell, co. Brecon, 1680. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Williams, Marmaduke, s. Nic., of Rhydodwyn, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Feb., 1667-8, aged 18; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1678; died in 1708; brother of Nicholas 1669, and of Rice 1661. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Estance, Edmund, s. Thomas, of Llansannor, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 April, 1667, aged 18, vicar of Cadoxton, co. Glamorgan, 1670, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Powell, John, s. Dav., of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1667, aged 16; extra licentiate college of physicians 1690. See Munk's Roll, i. 481.
Parry, Ellis, s. Hen. of Pwllhelli, co. Carnarvon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1667-8, aged 20; vicar of Aberdaron, co. Carnarvon, 1671. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Evans, John, s. Dav., of Trowarth, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1667, aged 19; B.A. 1671; perhaps M.A. from Jesus Coll., Cambridge, 1674.
Nicoll, George, s. John, of Isle of Jersey, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1667, aged 15; perhaps B.A. from Pembroke Coll. 1671, as Nicolle.
Jones, Lewis, s. Lewis, of "Tallin," co. Brecon. pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 May, 1667, aged 16; B.A. 24 Jan., 1670-1, M.A. 1673.
Baddeley, George (Badeley), s. George, of Great Nesse, Salop, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1667, aged 19; B.A. 1671.
Powell, Thomas, s. Tho., of Horsley, co. Denbigh, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1667, aged 17; of Horsley; died s. p.
Thomas, Howell, s. "Tho. Williams," of Llandevailog, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 May, 1667, aged 16.
Thomas, David, s. "Tho. Hughs," of Colwinstow, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1667, aged 21.
Thomas, Leyson, s. "Tho. Leyson," of Neath, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1667-8, aged 19.
Meredith, Giles, s. Giles, of Cwmdu, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 May, 1667, aged 19.
Wynne, Robert, s. Rob., of Voelas, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1667, aged 17.
Browne, William, s. John, of Oxford (city), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 March, 1667, aged 17.

Jones, Barzillai, s. Jenkin, of Llanthetty, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 13; B.A. 12 Feb., 1671-2, M.A. 1674; dean of Lismore in Ireland 1683-90, treasurer of Waterford cathedral 1684-6, chancellor 1686-90, attainted by James II., declined to take the oaths to King William and Queen Mary; father of James 1696, and of the next-named, and of Ormond 1708. See Cotton's Fasti Ecc. Hib. i. 169.

Gamage, Thomas, s. Edw., of Coychurch, co. Glamorgan (minister), archdeacon of Landaff. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1668-9, aged 21; B.A. 1672, M.A. 1675, rector of Ubley, Somerset, 1679, vicar of Pembrye, co. Cardigan, 1681, and of Llangevelach, co. Glamorgan, 1681, canon of St. David's 1682, rector of Llanedi, co. Carnarvon, 1682; brother of Edward same date, and father of John 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Richard, s. "John Prichard", of Llanhychan, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 April, 1668, aged 18; B.C.L. 1674, D.C.L. 1679 (perhaps rector of Eglwysfach, co. Denbigh, 1672), chancellor to bishop of Bangor, rector of Llanychen, co. Denbigh, 1675, until deprived as a non-juror 1689, rector of Llansannan, co. Denbigh, 1680. See Fasti, ii. 370; Thomas, St. Asaph, 434; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Vaughan, Henry, s. Pendred, of Llandyrock, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 April, 1668, aged 18, B.A. 23 Jan., 1671-2, M.A. 1676; vicar of Trelach-ar-Bettws, co. Carmarthen, 1688, rector of Penderyn, co. Brecon, 1689, vicar of Clodock, co. Hereford, 1699. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Gamage, Edward, s. Edw., of Coychurch, co. Glamorgan (minister), archdeacon of Llandaff. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1668-9, aged 22; B.A. 1672, M.A. 1675, rector of Coychurch 1686, of Nicholaston, 1696, and of Oxwich (all co. Glamorgan), 1696; brother of Thomas same date. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Edward, s. David, of Tuythin, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 April, 1668, aged 18; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1678; licenced 21 Sept., 1676, to marry Elizabeth Atwood, of St. Andrew, Holborn, spinster. See Foster's Judges and Barristers & London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster.

Lloyd, (Sir) John, "bart.," s. John, of Forrest, co. Carmarthen, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1668, aged 17; created M.A. 9 July, 1669, a student of Lincoln's Inn 1671 (as Floyd), 2nd bart.; died in 1674. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Wynne, William, s. John, of Henllan, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 18, B.A. 1672, fellow. M.A. 1675: perhaps of Lincoln's Inn 1680; author of "The History of Wales," 1697; died before 1711. See Hearne, iii. 201.

Awbrey, (Sir) John, s. John, of Llantrythydd, co. Glamorgan, Bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1668, aged 18; of Llantrithyd, 2nd baronet, M.P. Brackley 1698-1700, killed Sept., 1700, by a fall from his horse, father of the next named.

Lloyd, Edward, s. Isaac, of Llaneglas, co. Montgomery, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 April, 1668, aged 17; one of these names M.P. Montgomery 1678-9 (by double return) till void 1 April, 1679. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Penry, Hugh, s. Th., of Lluell (Llwyell), co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Feb., 1668-9, aged 16; B.A. 1672, M.A. 1675, vicar of Talgarth 1674, and rector of Llanelieu, co. Brecon, 1676. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Vaughan, Robert, s. Hum., of Harlech, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 Oct., 1668, aged 17, B.A. 1672, M.A. 1675; rector of Wolves Newton, co. Monmouth, 1681; father of the next. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Howell, John, s. J., of Llanglydwen, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Nov., 1668, aged 17; B.A. 1672; perhaps rector of Llanfrynach, co. Pembroke, 1674. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, Robert, s. John, of Llanellian, co. Denbigh, (subs.) "pauperis." Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 18; one of these names vicar of Nannerch 1679. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jeffreys, Jeffrey, s. Tho., of Llywel, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1668, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1676. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Vaughan, Edward, s. Tho., of Aberg(willy), co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 April, 1668, aged 15; student of Gray's Inn 1669. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Parry, Richard, s. John, of Pwllhaylog-in-Combe, Flints, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 July, 1668, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn 1670. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Wynn, John, s. John, of Capperleny, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 18; student of Gray's Inn 1669. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Jones, Thomas, s. "Joh. Philips", of St. Bride's Major, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 March, 1668-9, aged 20; B.A. 1673.
Penry, Hugh, s. James, of Devynock, co. Brecon, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Feb., 1668-9, aged 16; brother of James 1677.
Francklynne, John, s. Tho., of "Carmarthen" town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Feb., 1668-9, aged 16; B.A. 20 March, 1672-3.
Jones, Evan, s. Maur., of Llanidan, co. Anglesey, pp. Jesus Coll. matric. 30 Oct., 1668, aged 18; B.A. 1672, as Evans.
Jones, Owen, s. "Joh. Edmund", of Aberfraw, co. Anglesey, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 Oct., 1668, aged 19.
Games, John, s. "Hoe,", of Nowton, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 April, 1668, aged 17.
Wynne, Owen, s. Hugh, of Gwenfeny, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1668, aged 16, B.A. 1672.
Davies, Henry, s. Tho., of Newton, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 April, 1668.
Roberts, William, s. Tho., of Brecknock, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1668, aged 22.

Price, Henry, s. Ellis, of Rhuddlan, Flints, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. entry 19 Nov., 1669, aged 14; B.A. 1673, M.A. 1676; one of these names headmaster of Ruthin school 1680, prebendary of Llanfair, in St. Asaph, 1684, a non-juror 1691, and deprived; brother of Hugh 1669. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 252.

Nevile, (Sir) Edward, s. E., of Grove, Notts, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1669, aged 17; of Grove, Notts, knighted 11 Dec., 1671, and created a baronet 24 Feb., 1674-5, M.P. East Retford 1678-81, and 1685, until his death about 1686. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Morgans, Edward, s. John, of Llanymowddwy, co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 April, 1669, aged 18; B.A. 27 Feb., 1672-3, M.A. 1676 (as Morgan), rector of Llangelynin, co. Merioneth, 1672; father of the next. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Price, Hugh, s. Ellis, of Ruddlan, Flints, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Nov., 1669, aged 16; one of these names vicar of Whitford 1684, rector of Gwaynysgor 1686, and of Caerwys, all Flints, 1695; brother of Henry 1669. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morris, Hugh, s. "Morris Griffiths," of Guilsfield, co. Montgomery, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1669, aged 20; B.A. 1673; perhaps rector of Bangor-Is-y-Coed 1687, until deprived as a nonjuror 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Vaughan, William, s. Joh., of Llandevailog, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1669, aged 17; one of these names rector of Llanvillo, co. Brecon 1674, and father of William 1701. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Pranch, Richard (Praunch), s. Morris, of Glamorgan (town), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 20; vicar of Magor 1684, and rector Llanvihangel Rogiet, co. Monmouth, 1695. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Herbert, Charles, . C(harles), of Crickhowel, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 July, 1669, aged 17; B.A. 1673, bar.-at-law, of Gray's Inn, 1675. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Wynne, Randolph (or Randle), s. Rob., of Clynnog, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 21; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1679. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Lewis, William, s. "Lewis Owen," of Dolgelly, co. Merioneth, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 March, 1669-70, aged 18; perhaps vicar of Towyn, co. Merioneth, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Glynne, William, s. Richard, of ' Elernion,' co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1669, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1679. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Williams, Nicholas, s. Nich., of Rhydodyn, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1669, aged 15, B.A. 13 Feb., 1672-3; brother of Marmaduke 1668, and of Rice 1661.
Lloyd, Edward, s. Tho., of Halghton, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1669, aged 15; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1677. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Lloyd, Daniel, s. Lewis, of Llangennech, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Aug., 1669, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn 1671. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Lloyd, Pierce, s. P., of Penrose, co. Anglesey, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1669, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1671. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lloyd, Griffith, s. Ben., of co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 18; subs. as "Griffin Floyd"; B.A. 1673, M.A. 1676, B.D. 1684.
Dymocke, John, s. Edm., of Sontley, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 May, 1669, aged 17, B.A. 13 Feb., 1672-3; incorp. at Cambridge 1677.
Smith, William, s. William (1628), of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1669, aged 16, B.A. 8 Feb., 1672-3, as Smyth.
Evans, Edmund, s. James, of Disert, co. Radnor, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1669, aged 16; B.A. 20 Jan., 1672-3, B. and D.C.L. 1685.
Morgans, Thomas, s. "Morgan Thomas," of Cilycwm, co. Carmarthen, paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 May, 1669, aged 18; B.A. 8 Feb., 1672-3.
Pugh, Leoline, s. Hugh Lewis, of Cilau-Aeron, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1669, aged 20; brother of Morgan 1662.
Evans, Thomas, s. "Evan Thomas, of Llantrisant Misken, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1669, aged 21; B.A. 1673.
Floyd, Griffin, s. Ben., of co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 18, as "Griffith Lloyd," which see.
Thomas, Philip, s. "Th. ap Thomas," of Mydrim, co. Carmarthen, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Nov., 1669, aged 20.
Williams, Edward, s. William, of Viner (Vaenor), co. Cardigan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1669, aged 20.
Griffith, Hoel, s. "Griff Howell", of Mothvey, co. Carmarthen, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1669, aged 21.
Mostyn, Richard, s. Rog., of Dolycorslyn, co. Montgomery, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1669, aged 18.
Vaughan, Charles, s. Tho., of Abergwilly, co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Aug., 1669, aged 18.
Bowens, Thomas, s. William, of Llanywerne, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Aug., 1669, aged 15.
Davies, David, s. Da., of Llangoydmore, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1669, aged 19.
Whicheloe, Francis, s. R., of Wallingford, Berks, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 March, 1669-70, aged 18.
Glynn, Richard, s. Edw., of Glynn, co. Montgomery, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1669, aged 17.
Thomas, William, s. Joh., of Wick, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 July, 1669, aged 18.
Evans, Edward, s. Herb., of Neath, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Aug., 1669, aged 15.
Griffith, Thomas, s. Th., of Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 17.
Jones, Evan, s. Dav., of Glamorgan town, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1669-70, aged 18.
Morgan, John, s. Da., of Cardigan (town), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1669, aged 20.
Price, John, s. Hugh, of Oswestry, Salop, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 June, 1669, aged 18.
Harries, James, s. Edmund, of Caermarthen, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 July, 1669, aged 18.

Lloyd, Roger, s. Joh. of Haverfordwest, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll. matric. 1 July, 1670, aged 16; B.A. from Brasenose Coll. 1674, M.A. 1677, rector and vicar of Tenby St. Mary 1682, rector of Yerbeston 1686, of Llawrenny 1688, and of Burton, co. Pembroke, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Potts, John, s. Pearsevall, of Carmarthen (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 April, 1670, aged 18; B.A. 23 March, 1673-4; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1681, rector of Roborough, Devon, 1679; father of Percival 1709. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Edmonds, David (Edmund), s. Dav., of Laleston, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 March, 1670-1, aged 18; B.A. 1674, M.A. 1677, rector of Newton Nottage, co. Glamorgan, 1678. See Foster's Index Eccl. See Thomas, 1714, next page.

Owens, John, s. Ow., of Llanystymdwy, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1670, aged 19; B.A. 1674, M.A. 1677, vicar of Clynnog 1684, and rector of Llanengan, co. Carnarvon, 1687. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Vaughan, William, s. David, of Cardiff, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1670, aged 17, B.A. 1674; perhaps vicar of Swansea 1677, and rector of Llanedy, co. Carmarthen, 1680. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Cooke, Thomas, s. Morgan, of Langan, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1670-1, aged 16; B.A. 1674, vicar of Newcastle, co. Glamorgan, 1676. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Mostyn, William, s. Tho., of Rhyd, Flints, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1670, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1672. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Evans, Cadwgan, s. Reynold, of St. Nicholas, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 April, 1670, aged 22; B.A. 29 Jan., 1673-4.
Weld, John, s. Ralph, of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 April, 1670, aged 15, B.A. 28 Feb., 1673-4, M.A. 1676.
Jones, Richard, s. "Joh. Richard", of Dolbenmaen, co. Carnarv., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 March, 1670-1, aged 19; B.A. 1674.
Sam(m)es, Robert, s. Justinian, of Bodedern, co. Anglesea, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1670, aged 19; B.A. 1674, as Samms.
Gamage, Philip, s. Edw., of Coychurch, co Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 July, 1670, aged 18; B.A. 1674, M.A. 1677.
Lort, Roger (Llortt), s. Rog., of Stackpoole, co. Pembroke, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 Nov., 1670, aged 15.
Jones, William, s. G. (?Gul.), of Penlyn, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 July, 1670, aged 18.
Jones, Maurice, s. Griffith, of co. Carnarvon town, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1670, aged 19.
Parry, David, s. D., of Llanvapley, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1670, aged 19.
Jones, Samuel, s. William, of Hope, co. Flint., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 July, 1670, aged 16.
Jenkins, Edward, s. Rich., of Glamorgan town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 April, 1670, aged 16.
Jones, Charles, s. Lewis, of Brecknock town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1670, aged 21.
Rutland, Charles, s. G., of Loughton, Essex, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1670, aged 17.

Lloyd, John, s. Hugh, of Foxhall, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1671, aged 19; student of Middle Temple 1672; perhaps licenced (V.G.) 10 April, 1683, to marry Anne Moore, of St. Giles-in-the-Fields, spinster. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Walter, Thomas, s. Joh., of Percefield, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 17, B.A. 1677, M.A. 1680; perhaps rector of Rowley, Yorks, 1690-1704; brother of John 1667. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Fasti, ii. 373.

Sampson, John, s. John, of Kersey, Suffolk, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1671, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1671, as of Sampson Hall, Suffolk, gent.; buried in the Temple church 10 May, 1674. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Jones, Miles, s. "Joh. M.", of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1671-2, aged 20; B.A. 1677, M.A. 1679, rector of Flemingstone 1677, and of St. Bride's Major, co. Glamorgan, 1683. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Thomas, Robert, s. Ro., of Llanvihangle, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1671, aged 17, B.A. 1675, M.A. 1678; student of Lincoln's Inn 1676 (his father then knight and bart.). See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Bassett, John, s. William, of Landough, co. Glamorgan, minister. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1671-2, aged 17; one of these names rector of Llandow, co. Glamorgan, 1681. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Lewis, Richard, s. Lewis Griffith, of Llanboidy, co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 March, 1671-2, aged 18; B.A. 5 Feb., 1675-6; vicar of Llanboidy, co. Carmarthen, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Edwards, John, s. John, of Gwynscor, co. Flint, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 18; B.A. 1675; one of these names rector of Eastyn or Quenhope, Flints, 1676. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Davies, Mathuselah, s. Dav., of Llanvair-Trefligen, co. Cardigan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 17; vicar of Pencarreg, co. Carmarthen, 1696. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Vaughan, Peter, s. David, of Abergelly, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 16, B.A. 1674, M.A. 1677; vicar of Llangerniew, co. Denbigh, 1682. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wren, William, s. Tho., of Cardiff, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll. matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 18; rector of Michaelstone-le-Pit, co. Glamorgan, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Eyton, William, s. John, of Leeswood, co. Flint, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 18; possibly student of Inner Temple 1675. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Powell, Jeremiah, s. Hug., of Cwmtoyddwr, co. Radnor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn 1676. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Williams, Edward, s. Joh., of Cwmdu, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 16, perhaps B.A. 1681; brother of John 1667, and Thomas 1673.
Foulkes, Humphrey, s. Peter, of Meriarrock, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1671-2, aged 17; B.A. 1675, M.A. 1678, called Fulco in Mat. Reg.
Jones, Robert, s. Rob., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 June, 1671, aged 18 (subs.), "serviens;" B.A. 1675. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 707.
Gamage, Edmund, s. Edm., of St. Bride's Minor, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671. aged 19; B.A. 1672, M.A. 1675.
Bolde, Samuel, s. Edward, of Flint (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 Nov., 1671, aged 19. See Dictionary of National Biography.
Vaughan, Owen, s. Rob., of Llanfairdolhairn, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 18, B.A. 9 Feb., 1674-5.
Griffith, Thomas (Griffyth), s. "Griff. Thomas", of Dolwyddelan, co. Carnarvon, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 June, 1671, aged 20.
Jones, David, s. "Joh. Thomas", of Llangadock, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1671-2, aged 18; B.A. 1676.
Evans, Richard, s. Jones, of Llangerney, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 19; perhaps B.A. 1681.
Phillipps, Daniel, s. Joh., of Llangan, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 17; B.A. 1675.
Morgan, William, s. "Morgan Jones," of Llanthetty, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1671-2, aged 18.
Williams, William, s. Morg., of Mothvey, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1671-2, aged 17.
Vaughan, Lewis, s. William, of "Caethly," co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 April, 1671, aged 18.
Button, Miles, s. Miles, of Boulston, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1671-2, aged 16.
Lloyd, David, s. Henr., of Gallyrodyn, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 17.
Rawlins, Thomas, s. Joh., of Clifford, co. Hereford, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 18.
Watkins, Samuel, s. Roland, of Llanvigan, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1671, aged 18.
Powell, Jeremiah, s. Dav., of Nantmell, co. Radnor, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 20.
Prosser, Roger, s. Tho., of Llywel, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 April, 1671, aged 17.
Prosser, John, s. Rog., of Glasbury, co. Radnor, p.p. Jesus Coll. matric. 14 July, 1671, aged 18.
Hitching, Thomas, s. Tho., of Pembroke town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 June, 1671, aged 19.

Vaughan, Richard, s. Joh., of Merthyr, co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 May, 1672, aged 16; B.A. from Merton Coll. 17 Dec., 1675; student of Gray's Inn 1673, licenced (V.G.) 12 July, 1692, to marry Arabella Phillipps, of Lincoln's Inn Fields, spinster. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.

Humphreys, Robert, s. Hugh, of Trefdray, co. Anglesea, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 March, 1672, aged 17; B.A. 5 Feb., 1675-6, M.A. 1685; rector of Llansadwrn, co. Anglesey, 1682, of Llanenddywn, co. Merioneth, 1684, and of Llanfachell, co. Anglesey, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Williams, David, s. "William Jones," of Llandevalley, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1672-3, aged 19, B.A. 1676, M.A. 1680; rector of Llanhamlach, co. Brecon, 1684, and prebendary of collegiate church of Brecon in St. Davids 1695. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Griffiths, Morgan, s. "Griffin Johns", of "Ystradgunlas," co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1672-3, aged 18; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679, perhaps vicar of St. Ishmael's 1682, and of Marloes 1682, and of St. Bride's (all co. Pembroke) 1687. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Williams, Roger, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1672-3, B.A. 1677; one Roger Williams of Serjeant's Inn, Chancery Lane, gent., bachelor, licenced (V.G.) 22 May, 1683 (aged 28), to marry Susan, daughter of Griffith Graunt, of Sygginston, co. Glamorgan.

Williams, Thomas, s. Joh., of Cwmdu, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1672-3, aged 16, B.A. 1676; M.A. from Hart Hall 1679; perhaps vicar of Broenllys, co. Brecon, 1677, and brother of Edward 1671, and John 1667. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Ball, William, s. G. (? 'Gul.'), of Treby, Cheshire, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 18; B.A. 18 Jan., 1675-6, M.A. 1678, one of these names vicar of Holywell 1682-92, and of Northop, Flints, 16911717. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Roberts, Edward, s. Rob. Morgan, of Llandryllo, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 Dec., 1672, aged 18, B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679; curate at St. Olave or St. Saviours, Southwark, lecturer at St. Magnus the Martyr, London. See Ath. iv. 723.

Herbert, John, s. John, of Crickhowel, co. Monmouth (rather Brecon), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1672, aged 18, B.A. 1676; possibly a student of Gray's Inn 1676, as son and heir of Edward, of Crickhowell. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.

Honywood, (Sir) William, of Evington, Kent, Bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 March, 1672, aged 17; 2nd bart. (on the death of his father, Sir Edward, in 1670), M.P. Canterbury 1685-7, 1689-98; died 1748, aged 94. See Foster's Baronetage.

Evans, David, s. "Evan Davys, of Mydrim, co. Caermarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 July, 1672, aged 18; B.A. 1676, vicar of Trelech-arBettws 1678, vicar of Llangunnor (both in co. Carnarvon) 1680. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Williams, Walter, s. Lewis, of Mydrim, co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1672-3, aged 18, B.A. 3 March, 1676-7; perhaps vicar of Llywell, co. Brecon, 1694. See Rawl. vi. 254; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Evans, Thomas, s. "Evan Williams, of Eglwysvach, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 May, 1672, aged 19; B.A. 5 Feb., 1675-6; one of these names rector of Llandogget, co. Denbigh, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Stedman, Francis, s. Joh., of Llangamarch, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1672-3, aged 19, B.A. 1676; vicar of Llanarthney 1681, and of Llangathen, co. Carmarthen, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jenkins, John, s. Rich., of Llangynor, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1672-3, aged 17; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1680, B.D. 1688, vicar of Penmark, co. Glamorgan, 1685. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Penry, Hugh, s. H., of Llangammarch, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1672-3, aged 14; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679, vicar of Llanvihangel Cwmdu, co. Brecon, 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gwyn, Edward, s. Roland, of Brecon town, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1672-3, aged 16; B.A. 1677, M.A. 1682, rector of Llyswen, co. Brecon, 1678, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lillingston, John, s. Geo., of Kingsey, Bucks, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Nov., 1672, aged 16; B.A. 1676, vicar of Ilmer, Bucks, 1677. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Nathaniel, s. Th., of Swansea, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 Nov., 1672, aged 15, B.A. 1676; died about 1679.
Jones, Robert, s. R., of Llanvihangell, co. Carnarv., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1672-3, aged 18; B.A. 1676, M.A. 1679.
Thomas, Thomas, s. William, of 'St. Clara,' co. Merioneth (?Carmarthen), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1672-3, aged 19.
Owens, Richard, s. Edw., of "Dol. Ellys," co. Montgomery, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 March, 1672, aged 18.
Price, Hugh, s. William, of Aler Bechan, co. Montgomery, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 17.
Lloyd, Martin, s. Lewis, of Carmarthen, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 16 (subs. as Floyd).
Williams, William, s. Joh., of Llanelwell, co. Radnor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1672, aged 18.
Gronow, Evan, s. Lewis, of Llantrithydd, co. Glamorgan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Nov. 1672, aged 18.
Owen, Hugh, s. Ric., of Isle of Anglesey, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 July, 1672, aged 18; B.A. 1676.
Twisleton, George, s. Geo., of Llyr, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 May, 1672, aged 19.
Floyd, Martin, s. Lewis, of Carmarthen, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 May, 1672, aged 16, as Lloyd.
Williams, John, s. Dav., p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1672-3, aged 18.
Griffiths, John, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 March, 1672.

Parry, John, s. J., of Llanychayron, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 May, 1673, aged 17; B.A. 20 March, 1678-9, M.A. 1684; one of these names rector of Newport, co. Pembroke, 1679. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Jones, Benjamin, s. Jenkyn, of Llanelly, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Nov., 1673, aged 16; B.A. 16 June, 1677, M.A. 27 May, 1680; one Benj. Johns, vicar of Zennar, Cornwall, 1683. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Griffiths, Rice, s. Matthew, of Cardigan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 Feb., 1673-4, aged 18; B.A. 1677, M.A. 1680 (as Griffith), vicar of Penbryn, co. Cardigan 1681; father of Rice 1714. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Tristram, William, s. Nic., of Waythett, co. Radnor, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 July, 1673, aged 16, B.A. 1677; vicar of Norton 1684, and of Llanvihangel-Nant-Melan, co. Radnor, 1703. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Prichard, Ellis, s. "Rich. Roberts," of Penmorvey, co. Carmarthen, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1673, aged 20; B.A. 24 March, 1678-9, rector of Edern, co. Carmarthen, 1689. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Watkins, Walter, s. W., of Uske, co. Monmouth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 July, 1673, aged 18, B.A. 1677; perhaps rector of Mitchel Troy, co. Monmouth, 1695. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Evans, George, s. William, of Posenall, Salop, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 May, 1673, aged 15; B.A. 20 March, 1677-8.
Platt, Samuel, s. Th., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 July, 1673, aged 18; B.A. 1677.
Jones, Maurice, s. Nath., of "Hendo Merv.," gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1673-4, aged 19.
Jones, William, s. Hugh, of Anglesea, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 Dec., 1673, aged 17; B.A. 1677.

Williams, Thomas, s. W., of Yals-vach, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 16, B.A. 1677, M.A. 1680; perhaps rector of Kegidog St. George 1684-7, and of Llanarmon-DyffrynCeriog 1687-1702, vicar of Llanrwst 1690-7, and of Llansannan, 1st portion, (all) co. Denbigh, 1696-1726, rector and vicar of Denbigh 1697-1726. See Fasti, ii. 373; Rawl. vi. 218; Thomas, 397, 565; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Price, John, s. Roland, of Denbigh (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 Feb., 1674-5, aged 18, B.A. 1678; M.A. from New Inn Hall 1681, rector of Bettws-Gwerfil-Goch, co. Merioneth, 1683, vicar of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, 1687, canon of St. Asaph 1693, deprived as a nonjuror. See Thomas, 251; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgan, Owen, s. Rob., of Llanbeddow, co. Anglesey, S.T.D. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 16; student of Gray's Inn 1676, as of Porthllongden, co. Anglesey, gent.; brother of Robert 1682, and William 1680. See Foster's Gray's Inn Register.

Gamage, Francis, s. Edw., of Coychurch, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1674-5, aged 16; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1681, vicar of Colwinstone, co. Glamorgan, 1704; father of the lastnamed. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Tramalier, Thomas, s. Josua, of the island of Guernsey, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 July, 1674, aged 16, B.A. 1678, M.A. 1682, B.D. 1690; vicar of Heston, Middlesex, 1712. See Rawl. xix. 166; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Corbett, Erasmus, s. Thomas, of (Great) Nash, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1674-5, aged 17; B.A. 1678, of the Middle Temple 1682, migrated to Gray's Inn 1691. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Davids, Thomas, s. William, of Rosemarket, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1674-5, aged 18; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1681, rector of Hasguard, co. Pembroke, 1702. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Griffith, Roland, s. Owen, of Tredraeth, Anglesey, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1674-5, aged 16; B.A. 24 March, 1678-9, M.A. 1682; perhaps rector of Llaneugrad, co. Angl., 1704. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Huxley, Timothy, s. Fr., of Astley Abbat, Salop, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Feb., 1674-5, aged 16; B.A. 1678, M.A. 1681, B.D. 1689; rector of Rotherfield Peppard, Oxon, 1697. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Thomas, s. Peirs, of Penrose, co. Anglesea, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1674, aged 18; perhaps student of the Inner Temple 1674, as of Lixroy, co. Anglesey. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Rutter, Fulco, s. Joh., of Demerchion, Flints, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 May, 1674, aged 18; B.A. 17 Jan., 1677-8, M.A. 1680, rector of Tilston, Cheshire, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, John, s. Edw., of Llanbedr, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 March, 1674-5, aged 18; student of Gray's Inn 1677. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Williams, William, s. Th., of Llywen, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1674-5, aged 18; perhaps B.A. from New Inn Hall 5 July, 1677.
Davies, John, s. 'David Hughes,' of Llanerchayron, co. Cardigan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 May, 1674, aged 21; B.A. 17 Jan., 1677-8.
Thomas, William, s. John, of Peterstone-in-Monk, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. entry 3 July, 1674, aged 14, B.A. 1678.
GriMth, William, s. Jenk., of "S. Gew," co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 March, 1674-5, aged 19; B.A. 1679.
Maddockes, John, s. Th., of Llandaff, co. Glamorgan. pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1674, aged 18; B.A. 1677.
Eyton, Richard, s. Rich., of Erbistoke, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1674, aged 17; B.A. 1678.
Lewis, William, s. Joh., of Llangeler, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1674, aged 20.
James, Nicholas, s. John, of Bryngwyn, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1674, aged 19.
Tayler, Charles, s. Nic., of Presteign, co. Radnor, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1674, aged 17.
Nanney, John, s. Rob., of Dolgelly, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 April, 1674, aged 17.
Drew, Walter, s. John, of Penrose, Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1674, aged 15.
Godden, Richard, s. John, of Charing, Kent, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1674, aged 18.

Birchinsha, David (Byrchinsha), s. J., of Llansanan, co. Denbigh, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 July, 1675, aged 17; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1683, rector of Lydford, Devon, 1688, vicar of Salcombe 1701, rector of Clyst St. Lawrence 1702. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Griffyth, John, s. Rich., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 May, 1675, aged 18; B.A. 20 March, 1683-4, M.A. 1687, rector of Llanelian, co. Denbigh, 1683, vicar of White Waltham, Berks, 1686-1723. See Fasti, ii. 401; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Bowen, William, s. Matthias, of Pembroke (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1675-6, aged 18; B.A. from University Coll., 1679, M.A. 1685, vicar of Broad Hempston, Devon, 1684, and rector of Combinteignhead 1687. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Jones, Philip, s. Tho., of "Caermarthen," pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 April, 1675, aged 17; B.A. 22 Feb., 1678-9, M.A. 1683; one of these names rector of Bettws Bledrws, and vicar of Lampeter-Pont-Stephen, co. Cardigan, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, William, s. Dan., of Llanstephen, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 March, 1675-6, aged 16; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682; vicar of Laugharne, and of Llansadwrn, co. Carmarthen, 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Mantle, Richard, s. Th., of Llanbedr, co. Radnor, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1675, aged 19; one of these names rector of Bicknor English, co. Gloucester, 1710, and father of the next. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Richard, s. R., of Llanspithid, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 Dec., 1675, aged 15; perhaps bar.-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1687 (son of Richard). See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Scudamore, James, s. J., of Llansillow, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1675, aged 17, B.A. 1679; vicar of Dixton, 1684, and of Rockfield, co. Monmouth, 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Watkins, Morgan, s. Watkin Prichard, of Devynnock, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1675, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1678. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
St. John, Oliver, s. William, of Penmark, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1675, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1678. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lloyd, Richard, s. Rich., of Arlington, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 July, 1675, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn, 1678. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Maysmor, David, s. Jenk., of Llansantffraid, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1675-6, aged 21. See Archæologia Cambrensis, 4 S. viii. 193.
Tasker, George, s. G., of Pill, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1675-6, aged 17; B.A. from University Coll. 1679, M.A. 1682.
Wynne, Edward, s. Joh., of Rhelownid, Flints, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1675, aged 19; brother of Peter 1667, and see also John 1624.
Hughes, William, s. Jo., of Plymtree, Devon, gent. (subs. "paup.") Jesus Coll., matric. 2 July, 1675, aged 18; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682.
Jones, Roger, s. "Joh. Roberts", of Abergelly, co. Denbigh, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1675, aged 20; B.A. 19 Feb., 1679-80.
Beynon, Thomas, s. Rees, of Llangenning, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 April, 1675, aged 18; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682.
Price, William, s. William, of Teguier, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1675, aged 16; B.A. 1679, M.A. 1682.
Salesbury, Hugh, s. Hen., of Clocaenog, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1675, aged 19; B.A. 1678.
Lewis, William, s. Sam., of Anglesey (town), pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 March, 1675-6, aged 19; B.A. 1680.
Evans, William, 1s. Herb., of Neath, co. Glamorgan, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1675, aged 17.

Wynne, Robert, s. R., of Llanvaur, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 16, B.A. 1680, fellow, M.A. 1683, B.D. 1691, D.D. 1695; vicar of Gresford, co. Denbigh, 1690, and rector of Llanfyllin, co. Montgomery, 1691, rector of Llanuwchlyn 1691, vicar of Gwyddelwern 1702, and of Llandanwg, (all) co. Merioneth, 1711, sinecure rector of Llansantffraid-yn-Mechain, co. Montgomery, 1719, succeeded his uncle Hugh (1658), chancellor of St. Asaph 1690-1743, canon 1691, chancellor of the cathedral 1693; brother of William 1688, father of Robert. See Rawl. vi. 113; Gutch MS. 346; Hearne, i. 233; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Thomas, Joseph, s. Rob., of Eglwyscummin, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 17, B.A. 21 March, 1681-2, M.A. 1686; student of Inner Temple 1678, vicar of South Mims, Middlesex, 1687, and rector of Llanbeder Velfrey, co. Pembroke, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Howell, Rice, s. Reginald, of Llanboydy, co. "Carm." pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 17; B.A. 1681, M.A. 1685, rector of Llanrian, co. Pembroke, 1687, and vicar of Llawhaden, co. Pembroke, 1688; brother of Joel 1686, and father of Rice 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Hugh, s. Rees, of Llanbadarn, co. Cardigan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Oct., 1676, aged 17; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1680; vicar of Dulverton, Somerset, 1682-90, of Llanfihangel-ystrad, and of Trefilan (both co. Cardigan), 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Davies, Roland, s. 'Dav. Williams,' of Llangadog, co. Carmarthen, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 17; B.A. 22 Feb., 1680-1, rector of Llanlid alias St. Juliet, co. Glamorgan, 1695. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Thomas, John, s. "Th. Jones," of Llanvrynach, co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 18, B.A. 1680; perhaps vicar of Belchamp Water, Essex, 1681. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Howell, Thomas, s. Th., of Llanboydy, co. "Carm." pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 18; perhaps rector of Henllan-Amgoed, co. Carmarthen, 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Davies, Francis, s. Maurice, of Llangan, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 18; B.A. from Gloucester Hall 1680, M.A. from New Inn Hall 1683.
Lewis, Thomas, s. Gabr., of Llanishen, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 June, 1676, aged 16; B.A. 19 Feb., 1679-80.
Mainwaring, Thomas (Maynwaring), s. Th., of Llandovery, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 Dec., 1676, aged 19.
Morgans, David, s. Morgan Davies, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 16; B.A. 3 March, 1680-1, as Morgan.
Wynne, Peter, s. Rog., of Combe, Flints, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 Oct., 1676, aged 18, B.A. 1680, M.A. 1683.
Lewis, John, s. Lewis Edwards, of Brecon (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 July, 1676, aged 20; B.A. 1680.
Barry, Thomas, s. Rich., of Cowbridge, co. 'Glam.,' p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 20.
Owens, Henry, s. Morg., of Mowddwy, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 17.
Richards, John, s. Tho. of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 June, 1676, aged 18.
Bowen, Richard, s. William, of Neath, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1676, aged 20.
Jones, Lewis, s. Dav., of 'Carmard' town, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1676-7, aged 16.

Bowen, Arnold, s. Th., of Haverford(west), co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1677-8, aged 18; B.A. from Brasenose Coll. 1681, M.A. from Jesus Coll. 1684, vicar of Llawhaden, co. Pembroke, 1686, rector of Prendergast 1687, and of Robeston West 1691, canon of St. David's 1691, rector of Pwllchrochon, co. Pembroke, 1703. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Williams, David, s. "William Howell," of Llanspithet, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1677-8, aged 17, B.A. 1681, M.A. (by decree) 10 Nov., 1685; vicar of LlanfihangelCwmdu 1697, of Haye 1701, and of Crickhowell, (all) co. Brecon, 1701; perhaps father of William 1714. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Owen, John, s. William, of Eglyssono (Eglwyswrw), co. Pembroke, S.T.D. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Dec., 1677, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1690; dead before 6 July, 1698; Rebecca his mother executrix; twin with William same date. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Seys, Matthew, s. Rich., of Keriigston, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 July, 1677, aged 16; B.A. 8 March, 1680-1, M.A. 17 March, 1683-4; ensign of a company of scholars 1685, during the Duke of Monmouth's rebellion. See Ath. i. p. ciii.

Griffiths, Howell, s. "Gryffin Watkyn", of Devynnog, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1677-8, aged 16; B.A. 1681, M.A. 1684, vicar of Llangeler, co. Carmarthen, 1688, and of Llanafanfawr, co. Brecon, 1694. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Prichard, Richard, s. Roland, of Llanddoysant, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 15; B.A. 1680, M.A. 1683, cursal canon of St. Davids 1707, vicar of Llanegwad, co. Carmarthen, 1712. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Wynne, John, s. Griff., of Mallwyd, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 19, B.A. 12 March, 1684-5; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1685; brother of David 1694, and of Griffith. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Lloyd, Thomas, s. Th., of Llangadock, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 15; possibly student of Gray's Inn, 1679, as of Dan-y-ralt, co. Carmarthen, esq. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Evans, John, s. William, of Tregare, co. Monmouth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 July, 1677, aged 16; one of these names rector of Llanllowell, co. Monmouth, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, David, s. D., of Anglesey (town), pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1677-8, aged 18; B.A. 1681, M.A. 1684, rector of Llanrhudlad, co. Anglesey, 1689. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, Richard, s. Hug., of Llanrhaiadr, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1677-8, aged 18; perhaps bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1685. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Lloyd, William, s. Tho., of Llanbadarn, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1677-8, aged 18; B.A. 1681; vicar of Llanilar, co. Cardigan, 1687. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, John, s. William, of Abergwilly, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1691. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Spencer, John, s. Th., of Kington, co. Hereford, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 15, B.A. 3 March, 1680-1, fellow, M.A. 1683, admon. at Oxford 12 Feb., 1689-90.
Evans, John, s. William, of Bridgnorth, Salop, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 June, 1677, aged 15; one of these names rector of Stockton, Salop, 1690. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Owen, William, s. William, of Eglyssono (Eglwyswrw), co. Pembroke, S.T.D. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Dec. 1677, aged 17; B.A. 1681, as Owens; twin with John same date.
Games, Edward, s. Barth., of Llanvrynach, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 May, 1677, aged 14; student of Gray's Inn 1677. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Davies, John, s. Joh., of Lampeter, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 March, 1677-8, aged 15; B.A. 1681, perhaps twin brother of Lewis same date.
Davies, Lewis, s. Joh., of Lampeter, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 March, 1677-8, aged 15; B.A. 1681, perhaps twin brother of John same date.
Twiston, John, s. Th., of Denbigh (town), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 18; perhaps B.A. from New Inn Hall 17 May, 1681, as Twisden.
Hughes, Hugh, s. William, of Llanwythelan (?), co. "Mont.," pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 20; B.A. 8 March, 1680-1.
Penry, James, s. J., of Devynock, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 16, B.A. 1680; brother of Hugh 1669.
Jones, Evan, s. "Joh. Hughes", of Llandissilio-gogo, co. "Carm.," pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 March, 1677-8, aged 19.
Jones, John, s. Tho., of Llanfayer Nantgwyn, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1677-8, aged 15.
Lewis, Richard, s. Oliver, of Haverfordwest, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 July, 1677, aged 18.
Holland, Thomas, s. Rob., of "Eglwys-vach," co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 20.
Lloyd, Francis, s. William, of Llandebie, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 16.
Jones, William, s. William, of Pendoylon, co. Glamorg., pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 March, 1677-8, aged 19.
Taynton, Nathaniel, s. Th., of Pontypool, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 June, 1677, aged 20.
Humphreys, John, s. Rich., of Llanfihangel, co. "Mer." pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 July, 1677, aged 18.
Lloyd, John, s. Th., of Llangaddock, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1677, aged 16.
Jones, Owen, s. John, of Llanvechangel, co. "Carm.," gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 May, 1677, aged 16.
Parry, John, s. Rich., of Llanarmon, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1677, aged 17.
Jones, Stephen, s. Richard, of Denbigh town, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1677, aged 19.

Williams, Tobias, s. Rich., of Llanspythydd, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 July, 1678, aged 15, B.A. 1682, M.A. 1686; vicar of Wellington, Somerset, 1689, and of Devynnock (1st part), co. Brecon, 1694, rector of Merthyr Tydvil, co. Glamorgan, 1697. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Gwyn, James, s. Joh., of Ystradgunlais, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1678, aged 15; B.A. 1682, M.A. 1685, rector of Bryngwyn, co. Radnor, 1684, and of New Radnor 1690, canon of Hereford 1695. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bevan, William, s. Joh., of St. Clears, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 Dec., 1678, aged 17; B.A. 1682, M.A. 1685, one of these names rector of Llanfrynach, co. Pembroke, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Hughes, Richard, s. Hugh, of Llangoed, Anglesey, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1678, aged 19; B.A. 1682, rector of Rhoscolyn, co. Anglesey, 1685, and of Llanddeusant 1687. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Lloyd, Thomas, s. Joh., of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 Nov., 1678, aged 18; B.A. 1682; perhaps vicar of St. Bride's Major, co. Glamorgan, 1700. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Vaughan, Edward, s. Phil., of Trymsfaran, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 June, 1678, aged 18; student of Gray's Inn 1682. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Lloyd, John, s. Sim., of Llanynys, co. Denbigh, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 May, 1678, aged 16; vicar of Llanynys 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Rossendale, Michael, s. Th., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 July, 1678, aged 17, B.A. 27 Feb., 1682-3, M.A. 1685.
Lloyd, Roger, s. Peirs, of Anglesey (town), gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 May, 1678, aged 20; B.A. 19 Jan., 1681-2.
Harper, Thomas, s. Th., of Llan-Nicolas, co. Montgomery, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 July, 1678, aged 15.
Lloyd, Oliver, s. Charles, of Bletherwick, co. Radnor, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 April, 1678. aged 18.
Robinson, Hugh, s. Joh., of Ruabon, co. Denbigh, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 Dec., 1678, aged 18.
Williams, John, s. Tho., of Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1678-9, aged 18.
Davies, Henry, s. Owen, of Oxford (city), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1678, aged 18.

Lloyd, (Sir) Charles, s. Fr., of Forest Hill, Oxon, eq. aur. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 Nov., 1679, aged 17; of Milfield, co. Cardigan, knighted 24 Nov., 1693, and created a baronet 1 April, 1708, M.P. Cardigan 1698-1700; died 28 Dec., 1723; his father Francis Lloyd, M.P., of co. Cardigan, knighted 24 Feb., 1642. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Yorath, Richard, s. R., of Llantwit Major, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1679, aged 15, B.A. 23 Jan., 1682-3, M.A. 1685; vicar of Bassaleg, co. Monmouth, 1691 (as Youreth), and rector of Llanmaes, co. Glamorgan, 1691, as Yoroth. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Hopkins, William, s. William, of Monmouth town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Oct., 1679, aged 17; B.A. 1683, M.A. 1686; vicar of Ragland 1684, and of Llanvihangel-ystern-Llewern, co. Monmouth, 1685, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Wynne, Robert, s. Joh., of Llanbedrock, co. Carnarvon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1679, aged 17; perhaps vicar of Llanbeblig, 1693, and of Rhiw, (both) co. Carnarvon, 1706, canon of Bangor 1710. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Puleston, Kenrick, s. Jo., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1679-80, aged 16; B.A. 1683, M.A. 1686, B.D. 1694, rector of Hinton-Ampner, Hants, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Miles, John, s. William, of Cowbridge, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 May, 1679, aged 16; B.A. 15 Feb., 1682-3, rector of Porthkerry, co. Glamorgan, 1686. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Dale, George, s. Robert, of Bakewell, co. Derby, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1679, aged 17; of Flagg, co. Derby, admitted to Gray's Inn 1680, died in 1683. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Vaughan, Rowland, s. Edw., of Mallwyd, co. Merioneth, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 April, 1679, aged 19, B.A. 15 Feb., 1682-3; rector of Mallwyd 1688. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Savage, Andrew, s. A., of Llanbrynmair, co. Montgomery, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1679, aged 17; his father vicar of Llanbrynmair 1662. See also Richard 1694.
Roberts, John, s. Rich., of Abergavenny, co. Monmouth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 June, 1679, aged 16; student of Middle Temple 1682. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Morgan, William, born in Anglesey, s. Robert, bishop of Bangor. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Feb., 1679-80, aged 16, B.C.L. 1685; brother of Owen 1674, and Robert 1682.
Powell, Lewis, s. L., of Llywell, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 April, 1679, aged 19; B.A. 22 March, 1682-3, vicar of Llywell; father of John 1703.
Morgan, Rice, s. "Morgan Roberts," of Bangor, co. Carnarvon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1679, aged 17; B.A. 22 March, 1687-8, M.A. 28 May, 1695.
Lewis, Thomas, s. "Lewis Thomas," of Llanvapley, co. Monmouth, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1679, aged 18; B.A. 29 Jan., 1683-4.
Evans, David, s. Evan, of Carno, co. Montgomery, paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 July, 1679, aged 19; father of David 1706.
Hookes, John, s. Nic., of Conway, co. Carnarvon, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 June, 1679, aged 18; B.A. 4 March, 1685-6.
Glynne, Richard, s. R., of Llan Hayer, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1679, aged 18; B.A. 1683.
Leolin, Thomas, s. "Leoline Williams," of Cantreff, co. Brecon, pp. Jesus Coll. matric. 28 March, 1679, aged 20.
Bevan, Charles, s. James, of 'Ye Hay,' co. Brecon, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1679-80, aged 16.

Powell, Henry, s. Tho., of Clithero (Clyro), co. Radnor, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 Feb., 1680-1, aged 17; B.A. 4 March, 1685-6; M.A. from St. John's Coll., Cambridge, 1690, vicar of Hay 1688, of Llywell 1689, and of Talgarth (all co. Brecon) 1694, prebendary of Brecon 1693, of St. Davids 1694. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Maurice, s. "Jo. Prichard", of Llanhychan, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1680, aged 17; B.A. 1684, M.A. 5 Feb., 1686-7, B.D. 1694, rector of Llanhychan 1690, and of Cerrig-y-Druidion, co. Denbigh, 1697, cursal canon St. Asaph 1700. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, William, s. Hug., of Llangar, co. Merioneth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 March, 1680-1, aged 18; B.A. 1684, rector of Llangower 1688, and vicar of Gwyddelwern 1690, rector of Llanymowddwy, co. Merioneth, 1700-9. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Powell, Joshua, s. Rees, of Lampeter, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 17; B.A. 1683 (as Joseph), rector of Herbranston and Hubberston, co. Pembroke, 1696. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Parry, Edward, s. Rog., of Baguilt, Flints, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1680, aged 18; B.A. 13 Feb., 1685-6; vicar of Holywell, Flints, 1692. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Edwards, Francis, s. Fr., of Ogwel, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 March, 1680-1, aged 16; rector of Morvill, co. Pembroke, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Salesbury, Owen, s. William, of "Rug," co. Merioneth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1680-1, aged 17; brother of John same date.
Beale, Francis, s. Joh., of Llandilo, co. Carmarthen, paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 March, 1680-1, aged 18; B.A. 1684, M.A. 1687.
Lewis, James, s. James, of Kennarth, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1680-1, aged 16; brother of John 1686.
Jones, Griffin, s. "Jo. Roberts", of Carnarv. town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 April, 1680, aged 17; B.A. 1683, as Griffith.
Salisburye, John, s. William, of "Rug," co. Merioneth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 March, 1680-1, aged 15; brother of Owen.
Arthur, Rowland, s. William, of Bangor, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1680, aged 19; B.A. 1684.
Greene, Edward, s. Jo., of Llanvair, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 June, 1680, aged 17; B.A. 1684.
Griffith, John, s. William, of Llyne, co. Carnarvon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Nov., 1680, aged 18.
Mathews, Mansell, s. M., of Swansea, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1680, aged 17.
Morgan, Peter, s. Rich., of Llangower, co. Merioneth, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 July, 1680, aged 20.
