Peirce, Rice, s. "Peirce Griffith," of "Peath Kellent," (Beddgellert), co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 April, 1701, aged 17; B.A. 1705 (as Richard); vicar of Llangelynin, co. Merioneth, 1715. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Phillipps, Philip, s. James, of Aberporth, co. Cardigan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1701-2, aged 17, B.A. 1705; chaplain to the British Society in London, and to James, Earl of Berkeley. See Rawl. xxi. 70.
Phillips, Thomas, s. Th., of Aberedwy, co. Radnor, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 June, 1701, aged 18; B.A. 22 March, 1704-5; perhaps rector of Morvil, co. Pembroke, 1715-30. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Griffiths, Henry, s. Ezra, of Swansea, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 Dec., 1701, aged 17; B.A. 1705, rector of Reynoldston, co. Pembroke, 1720. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lewis, Roger, s. Ro., of Henllan, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 April, 1701, aged 18; perhaps rector of Herbranston, co. Pembroke, 1730. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Vaughan, William, s. William, of Llanvillo, co. Brecon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 April, 1701, aged 19; his father rector of Llanvillo 1695. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Thomas, s. Jon., of Tally, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Nov., 1701, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1701. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Llewelyn, Evan, s. Joh., of Buxham, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1701, aged 15; B.A. 1704 (as Edward).
Watkins, John, s. Joh., of Bassalegh, co. Monmouth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1701, aged 17, B.A. 1704, M.A. 1707.
Edwards, Cornelius, s. Edw., of Ruabon, co. Denbigh pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1701-2, aged 18; B.A. 25 Feb., 1705-6.
Parry, David, s. William, of Cardigan (town), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 April, 1701, aged 19; B.A. 1705, M.A. 1708.
Williams, William, s. Tho., of Isle of Anglesea, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1701-2, aged 18, B.A. 1705.
Mostyn, John, s. Henr., of Withernwar, co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 April, 1701, aged 15.
Mostyn, Samuel, s. Samuel, of Holywell, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 May, 1701, aged 18.
Robins, Hugh, s. Joh., of Isle of Anglesea, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1701-2, aged 17.
Prichard, Richard, s. Ellis, of co. Anglesea, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 May, 1701, aged 18.

Davies, Roger, s. William. of Llampeter, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Jan., 1702-3, aged 16, B.A. 1706; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1724, master of Carmarthen free school 1724, rector of Rosecrowther, co. Pembroke, 1724, cursal preb. of St. David's 1733. born 5 March, 1686-7, in the parish of Lampeter Velvrey. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Rawlinson, vi. 383, xvii. 6, xx. 170.

Lloyd, Thomas, s. John, of "Gurich," co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Jan., 1702-3, aged 18; B.A. 1706, M.A. 1709, vicar of Llandrillo-ynRhos, co. Denbigh, 1718, and of Llansannan 1726, and rector of Llandogget (all co. Denbigh) 1735, rector of Llysfaen, co. Carnarvon, 1737. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 397; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Griffin, s. Rowl., of Llanglany ("Llangalullny" in 4to.), co. Merion., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Jan., 1702-3, aged 19; B.A. 9 March, 1707-8 (as Griffith), M.A. from Magdalen Coll., Cambridge, 1719; one of these names rector of Llandowror, co. Carmarthen, 1716 until his death 9 April, 1761.

Williams, James, s. Sam., of Trewithydd, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1702, aged 17, B.A. 1705; perhaps M.A. from St. John's Coll., Cambridge, 1711, and vicar of Llanigon, co. Brecon, 1709. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Rogers, Joshua, s. Rog., of Trelonge, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1702, aged 18, B.A. 1705; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1714, vicar of Llangevelach, co. Glamorgan, 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Vaughan, John, s. Cadwal., of Osgarthorpe, co. Leicester, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Jan., 1702-3, aged 18, B.A. 1706, M.A. 1710; vicar of Belton, co. Leicester, 1713; brother of Thomas 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Edmonds, William, s. Thomas, of Margam, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1702, aged 18; rector of Coychurch, co. Glamorgan, 1708; brother of Thomas, 1700. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Rogers, William, s. Tho., of Carmarthen (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Nov., 1702, aged 18, B.A. 1706; rector of Llangeler, co. Carmarthen, 1712, until his death 28 Aug., 1732. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Griffithes, Cadwallader, s. Griffith, of Shrewsbury, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 July, 1702, aged 18; B.A. from Oriel Coll. 1706, vicar of Alderminster, co. Worcester, 1715. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Francklyn, James, s. Tho., of Chalton, Hants, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 March, 1702, aged 17 (16); B.A. 1705, M.A. 1708; brother of George same date, and of Charles and Thomas 1698.
Lloyd, Owen, s. Joh., of Llanrhaidr, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1702, aged 18; B.A. 1706, rector of Kegidog St. George, co. Denbigh, 1712. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Charles, s. Edw., of Llangunnider, co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1702, aged 17; perhaps vicar of Llanwrthwl, co. Brecon, 1715. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Cawley, James, s. Robert, of Gresford, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 June, 1702, aged 17; bar.-at law, Gray's Inn, 1711, dead before 1723. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Hughes, Price, s. Ric., of Welshpool, co. Montgomery, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Jan., 1702-3, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1710. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Francklyn, George, s. Tho., of Chalton, Hants, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 March, 1702, aged 18; B.A. 1705, M.A. 1708; brother of Charles and Thomas 1698, and of James 1702.
Lloyd, Robert, s. Evan, of Nantglyn, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Jan., 1702-3, aged 19; B.A. from St. John's Coll. 1706.
Phillips, William, s. John, of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Jan., 1702-3, aged 17; B.A. 1706, M.A. 1709.
Powell, Lewis, s. Lewis, of Pembroke (town), gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 June, 1702, aged 15. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Hughes, Robert, s. William ("Gal." 4to.), of Llandolly, Anglesea (4to.), cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Jan., 1702-3, aged 19.
Jones, Theop. (subs. "Theo."), s. Walter, of St. Clere, co. Caerm., gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1702, aged 17.
Phillips, Luke, s. Joh., of Dolhay, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Jan., 1702-3, aged 15; B.A. 1706.
Philipps, Richard, s. Scudamore, of Kiffig, co. Carmarthen, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 May, 1702, aged 16.

Williams, Rice (Ric. in Mat. Reg.), s. David, of Mothvey, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1703-4, aged 15, B.A. 1707, M.A. 1725, B. and D.D. 1753; archdeacon of Carmarthen with prebendary of Llanryan in St. Davids 1742, vicar of Llanrian, co. Pembroke, 1742, canon of Worcester 1742, until his death 26 Dec., 1766. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Edwards, Edward, s. Joh., of Caermarthen town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1703-4, aged 17: perhaps B.A. 24 Oct., 1707; M.A. from Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge, 1712, perhaps rector of Rhiw, co. Carnarvon, 1714, and of Llangybi and Llanarmon, co. Carnarvon, 1729-42, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Kyffin, Robert, s. Ric., of Mainan, co. Caerm., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Oct., 1703, aged 18; B.A. 1707, M.A. 1711; vicar of Mansell Lacey, and of Yazor, co. Hereford, 1711, prebendary of Hereford 1713, rector of Llanvigan, co. Brecon, 1711. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, William, s. John, of Abergelly, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 June, 1703, aged 18; perhaps B.A. 15 Oct., 1707, M.A. 9 July, 1710; possibly bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1716, and bencher 1733. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Loveling, John, s. William, of Castle Martin, co. Pembroke, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1703, aged 20; B.A. 1707, vicar of Cottesbrookes, Northants, 1708; brother of Benjamin, Thomas, and William. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Pranch, George, s. Ric., of Llanvihangell, co. Monmouth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Oct., 1703, aged 18; vicar of Magor 1705, and rector of Llanwern 1709, and vicar of Goldcliff (all co. Monmouth, 1729. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Gilbert, s. John, of Welchpool, co. Montgom., pleb. Jesus Coll. matric. 21 March, 1703-4, aged 16; B.A. 1707, perhaps vicar of St. Michael Moncton, with chapel of St. Mary, at Pembroke, 1722. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgan, Lewis, s. L., of Newport, co. Monmouth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Oct., 1703, aged 15; one of these names rector of Tallachddu, co. Brecon, 1708, and of Kilybebil, co. Glamorgan, 1716. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, James, s. Samuel, of Llandegla, co. Radnor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1703-4, aged 19; perhaps M.A. Lambeth 17 May, 1712, rector of Llanbardarn Fawr, co. Radnor, 1712. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Davies, Lewis, s. Richard, of Aberguiiley, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 May, 1703, aged 19; B.A. 20 March, 1706-7, vicar of Mydrim, co. Carmarthen, 1710. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Vaughan, Robert, s. Rob., of Wolves Newton, co. Monmouth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 June, 1703, aged 18; perhaps rector of Llanllowell, co. Monmouth, 1720. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Lloyd, William, s. Tho., of St. Asaph (town), co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Feb., 1703-4, aged 17; perhaps B.A. from New Inn Hall 18 March, 1707-8, but see next entry.
Jeffreys, Robert, 1s. Griffith (4to.), of Acton, co. Denbigh, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 June, 1703, aged 17. See Le Neve's Knights, 405, Harl. Society.
Pretherch, Owen (Prytherch), s. Joh., of Amlwch, co. Anglesea, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1703-4, aged 17, B.A. 12 March, 1707-8.
Williams, Thomas, s. Joh., of Llanrwst, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Dec., 1703, aged 18, B.A. 13 Feb., 1707-8, M.A. 1710.
Harris, Henry, s. Evan, of Llangam, co. Monmouth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 March, 1703-4, aged 15; B.A. 1707.
Edwards, Edward, s. Tho., of St. Bride, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1703-4, aged 18.
Thomas, David, s. Tho., of Evan-coychurch, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 June, 1703, aged 19.
Powell, Job, s. Lewis, of Lywell, co. Brecon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 April, 1703, aged 16.
Thomas, Henry, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 May, 1703, B.A. 17 March, 1706-7.

Pardo, Thomas, s. T., of Kidwelly, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1704-5, aged 17; B.A. 1708, M.A. 1711, B.D. 16 March, 1718-19 (incorporated at Cambridge 1719), D.D. 1727; principal of his college 1727-63, rector of Rhosilly, co. Glamorgan, 1717, cursal canon St. Davids 1725, vicar of Llanarth, co. Cardigan, 1726, rector of Clynnog Vawr, co. Carnarvon, 1726, vicar of Longworth, Berks, 1727, rector of Llandyssil, co. Cardigan, 1727, and of Rotherfield-Peppard, Oxon, 1727, canon of St. Davids 1723, and chancellor 1749-53; died 22 April, 1763; brother of Daniel 1712. See Gutch, i. 589; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Rossindale, s. Foulk, of Fox Hall, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Feb., 1704-5, aged 17; B.A. 3 March, 1708-9, M.A. 16 Jan., 1711-12, B. and D.D. 17 May, 1723. For verses on the death of Rosindale Lloyd, M.D., who died at Wrexham 2 Sept., 1734, see Gent's. Mag. 1735, p. 103.

Conway, Benjamin, s. James, of Evenechtyd, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1704, aged 17, B.A. 22 March, 1708-9; incorp. at Cambridge 1716, M.A. from St. John's Coll. 1716, vicar of Northop, 1717, warden of Ruthin Hospital 1720. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Parry, Edward, s. Tho., of Welchpool, co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1704, aged 16; B.A. 1707, M.A. 1712; vicar of Oswestry, Salop, 1713-36, sinecure rector of Darowen, co. Montgomery, 1720, and canon of St. Asaph 1722. See Thomas, 657; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Parry, David, s. John, of Holywell, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1704-5, aged 15; B.A. 1708, M.A. 1712; keeper Ashmolean museum 1709-14, rector of Nolton 1715, and of Bridell, co. Pembroke, 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgans, Edward, s. Ed., of Llangelynin, co. Merioneth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1704-5, aged 18; B.A. 1708 (as Morgan), vicar of Towyn 1717, and rector of Llanaber, co. Merioneth, 1726. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, John s. Owen, of Criccieth, co. Carn., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1704-5, aged 18; one of these names rector of Bodfean, co. Carnarvon, 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jennings, George, s. Edward, of St. Dunstan, Middlesex, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Feb., 1704-5, aged 17; student of Inner Temple 1701. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Morgan, John, s. Ed., of Llangelynin, co. Merioneth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1704-5, aged 16, B.A. 1708; M.A. from Catherine Hall, Cambridge, 1713.
Powell, Rice, s. Tim., of St. Clear, co. Carmarthen, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1704-5, aged 18; B.A. 12 Oct., 1708, as Richard.
Jenkins, David, s. Tho., of Llandenny, co. Monmouth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1704-5, aged 17; B.A. 1708.
Lewis, Lewis, s. Joh., of Llongelly (Dolgelly), co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 April, 1704, aged 18.
Llewelin, George, s. Joh., of St. George's, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Feb., 1704-5, aged 17.
Lewis, William, s. Ambro., of Llanrwadrus, co. Anglesea, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1704-5, aged 18.
Tyson, Richard, s. Sam., of Almonsbury, co. Gloucester, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1704-5, aged 16.
Jones, John, s. Walter, of St. Clare, co. Caerm., gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Feb., 1704-5, aged 18.

Lloyd, Humphrey, s. Fran., of Llandyrnock, co. Denbigh, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1705-6, aged 17; B.A. 1709, M.A. 1712, B.D. 1719; vicar of Oakley, Bucks, 1721, rector of portion of Tredington, co. Worcester, 1726, and of Elkstone, co. Gloucester, 1727, until his death in 1779. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Sebright, (Sir) Thomas Sanders, s. Edw., of Bidshut, co. Hereford, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. entry 3 June, 1705, aged 13; created M.A. 28 April, 1708, and D.C.L. 19 Aug., 1732; 4th bart., M.P. Herefordshire in 4 parliaments 1715, until his death death 12 April, 1736. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Jeffreys, William, s. Ric., of Llanurenoe (Llanywern), co. Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1705-6, aged 17; B.A. 1709; either this or the next man perhaps vicar of Aberyskir, co. Brecon, 1713-63, and of Llanvihangel Crucorney, co. Monmouth, 1722-65. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bowen, David, s. Ev(an), of Llandello, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1705-6, aged 16; B.A. 1709, incorp. at Cambridge 1719; M.A. from King's Coll. 1719, rector of Llampeter Velvrey, co. Pembroke, 1729. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Matthews, Andrew, s. Tho., of Hanmer, Flints, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1705-6, aged 19, B.A. 1709; M.A. from St. John's Coll., Cambridge, 1721, rector of Linby 1723, and of Nuthall, Notts, 1729, canon of Southwell 1734. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Rocke, Richard, s. R., of Myvod, co. Montgomery, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Jan., 1705-6, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1705, as son of Richard, of Trefnanneyin, co. Montgomery, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Hancorne, Richard, s. Tho., of St. Donats, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 Oct., 1705, aged 17; B.A. 1709, M.A. 1714, rector of Barry, co. Glamorgan, 1716, and of Sully 1721. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Parry, William, s. Devereux, of Hereford (city), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1705-6, aged 18; B.A. 1709, M.A. 1712, B.D. 1719, rector of Tellisford, Somerset, 1712-15. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Williams, William, s. Owen, of Ecclouglan, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 Oct. 1705, aged 18, B.A. 1709, M.A. 1712; rector of Leckwith, co. Glamorgan, 1714. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Brynker, William, s. James, of Llanfyhangell, co. Carnarvon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 March, 1705-6, aged 15; a student of Lincoln's Inn 1706, brother of James 1613. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Leyson, Morgan, s. Morgan, of Llangan, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1705-6, aged 15; B.A. 1709, M.A. 1712, B.D. 1719, rector of Longworth, Berks, 1728. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wynne, Richard, s. R., of Ruthin, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1705-6, aged 17, B.A. 1709, M.A. 1713; vicar of Bettws-ynRhos, co. Denbigh, 1727. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Evans, William, s. Tho., of Llanbery, co. Caernarvon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 Oct., 1705, aged 18; B.A. 1709, M.A. 1712, rector of Rhiw, co. Carnarvon, 1712, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gwynn, Richard, s. Arthur, of Llandebie, co. Carmarthen (4to.) gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Jan., 1705-6, aged 19; student of the Middle Temple 1707. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Jones, Thomas, s. Evan, of Llanfair, co. Montgomery, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1705, aged 16; perhaps rector of Llangadfan, co. Montgomery, 1711. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, John, s. Griffith, of Carmarthen (town), gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 May, 1705, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1707. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Barron, John, s. J., of Haverfordwest, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1705-6, aged 16; B.A. 2 March, 1709-10, M.A. 1712.
Williams, David, s. Joh., of Abergwilly, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1705-6, aged 18, B.A. 1709. See Rawl. xxi. 222.
Nicholls, Morgan, s. Iltid, of Llantwit Major, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 Dec., 1705, aged 16; perhaps father of Iltid.
Gunnis, Thomas, s. John, of Llanengan, co. Carnarvon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 June, 1705, aged 20; brother of Griffith 1701.
Lloyd, Thomas, s. Morg. (Rob. in 4to.), of Llanrhaidr, co. Montgomery, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1705-6, aged 16.
Meyrick, William, s. Joh., of Llanvary, co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1705-6, aged 17; B.A. 1709.
Watkins, William, s. William (4to.), of Merthyr, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 May, 1705, aged 19.
Leyson, Evan, s. Morg., of Llangan, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1705-6, aged 16.
Ellis, Tho, s. Joh., of Carnarvon town, doctoris. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Oct., 1705, aged 18.

Owen, William, 1s. Robert, of Oswestry, Salop, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 April, 1706, aged 17; student-at-law, of Gray's Inn, 1709 (as of Porkington), sheriff co. Merioneth 1712, and co. Carnarvon 1756; died 14 Feb., 1767, aged 79; brother of Lewis 1714. See Foster's Gray's Inn Register.

Twininge, Benjamin (Twyninge), s. Dan., of Llandisillio, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1706-7, aged 22, B.A. 22 Feb., 1710-11; rector of Henllan Amgoed, co. Carmarthen, 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Barnes, Nathaniel, s. William, of Whitbourne, co. Hereford, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Feb., 1706-7, aged 17; B.A. 1710, M.A. 1715, vicar of Ombersley, co. Worcester, 1722. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Parry, Lewis, s. Joh., of Pantyrodin, co. Cardigan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 March, 1706-7, aged 16; B.C.L. 1713, vicar of Llanarth, co. Cardigan, 1720; brother of Robert 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bowen, Walter, s. George, of Wolfdane, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 April, 1706, aged 19; B.A. 19 Jan., 1709-10, vicar of Roch Castle, co. Pembroke, 1715. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Gwynn, Thomas, s. Arthur, of Llandebie, co. Caermarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 Oct., 1706, aged 18; student of Middle Temple 1707. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lewis, Maurice, s. Maurice, of Angelsey, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1706-7, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1717. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Jones, Hugh, s. H., of isle of Anglesey, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 March, 1706-7, aged 17; B.A. 22 Feb., 1710-11, M.A. 1715. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 253.
Maurice, Richard, s. Thomas, of Llanguedlyn, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 July, 1706, aged 16; B.C.L. from New Inn Hall 6 July, 1715.
Tudor, John, s. Griff., of Trawsfynydd, co. Merioneth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1706, aged 18, B.A. 22 Feb., 1710-11, M.A. 1714.
Parry, Robert, s. Joh. of "Pantlydrodin," co. Cardigan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1706-7, aged 16; brother of Lewis 1707.
Popkins, Robert, s. Tho., of Llanchamlett, co. Glamorgan, pleb. (subs. arm.). Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1706-7, aged 17.
Roberts, Maurice, s. Rob. Williams, of Llanaper, co. Merioneth, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 March, 1706-7, aged 17.
Robinson, William, s. William, of Gresford, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 July, 1706, aged 18.
Rogers, Edward, s. Thomas, of Guilsfield, co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 July, 1706, aged 17.
Price, Francis, s. Lewis, of Llaneddy, co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1706-7, aged 17.
Lewis, Gabriel, s. Tho., of Llanishen, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1706-7, aged 19.
Roberts, Thomas, s. T., of Llandaff, co. Glamorgan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1706-7, aged 17.
Phillipps, George, s. Phil., of Naverne, co. Pembroke, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1706, aged 17.
Lewis, William, s. Maur., of Anglesey, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 March, 1706-7, aged 18.

Chambres, Charles, s. Edward, of Henlan, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 May, 1707, aged 18; B.A. 9 Feb., 1710-11, M.A. 1713, incorp. at Cambridge ? 1714, 2nd son of Edward, of Place Chambers, co. Denbigh, born 23 Dec., 1688, curate of Hitchin, Herts, vicar of Dartford, Kent, 1718, until his death 22 Feb., 1745-6. See Rawlinson, iii. 52, xvi. 361; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Gamage, John, s. J., of Llangunnor, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1707, aged 18; B.A. 27 Oct., 1710, M.A. 9 June, 1713 (or B.A. 26 Feb., 1710-11); either this man or the preceding vicar of Lullingstone, co. Derby, 1724, rector of Washington, co. Durham, 1727, and of Sedgefield, co. Durham, 1728. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Gamage, John, s. Tho., of Swansea, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1707, aged 16; B.A. 26 Feb., 1710-11 (or B.A. 27 Oct., 1710, M.A. 9 June, 1713); either this man or the next rector of Pusey, Berks, 1717, vicar of Bishops Lavington, Wilts, 1718, canon of Sarum 1721-47. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Roberts, Christopher, s. John, of St. Athan, co. Glamorgan, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Dec., 1707, aged 20, B.A. 1711 (as Charles); M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1722, vicar of Rockbeare 1720, rector of North Lew 1724, and vicar of Harberton (all Devon), 1726. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Daniel, Edward, s. Rob., of 'Llanthanatt,' co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1707, aged 19; B.A. 22 Feb., 1710-11, perhaps perpetual curate or vicar of Treyddyn 1735-8, vicar of Tremeirchion, Flints, 1738. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 613; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Brynker, Robert, s. James, of Brynker, co. Carm., (? Carnarvon), arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1707-8, aged 16; B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714, proctor 1720, B.D. 1722, rector of Tredington, co. Worcester, 1726, and of St. Breock, Cornwall, 1730. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Howell, Walter, s. Ric., of Llanboidy, co. "Caerm." (4to.), cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Feb. 1707-8, aged 15; B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714, vicar of Llanboidy 1716, cursal canon St. David's 1719, vicar of Llandilo Vawr, co. Carmarthen, 1723. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Charles, Joseph, s. Joseph, of Llanover, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 May, 1707, aged 16; B.A. 6 Feb., 1710-11, M.A. 1713, rector of Little Wacton, Norfolk, 1719, vicar of Swaftham 1720, rector of South Pickenham 1722. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Presland, Samuel, s. Richard, of Shrewsbury, Salop, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1707, aged 15; B.A. 1711, M.A. 26 Jan., 1713-14, student of Middle Temple 1707, vicar of Sow, and of Stoke, co. Warwick, 1720. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg. & Foster's Index Eccl.

Wynne, Thomas, s. Evan, of Llanvair, co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 June, 1707, aged 18, B.A. 1711, M.A. 3 Feb., 1713-14; rector of Llanrwst, co. Denbigh, 1714, cursal canon of St. Asaph 1722, and canon 1728. See Rawl. vi. 68; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Hughes, Rowland, s. Lewis, of Isle of Anglesey, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 March, 1707-8, aged 18, B.A. 1711; M.A. from Magdalen Coll., Cambridge, 1731, rector of Llanllyfini, co. Carnarvon, 1724, and of Eglwyssail, co. Anglesey, 1731. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Anthony, s. An. (4to.), of Llanegwad, co. Caermar., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Dec., 1707, aged 19; B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714, rector of Eglwys Cymmin, co. Carmarthen, 1716, and vicar of Llanegwad 1731. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bowen, William, s. John, of Upton, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Feb., 1707-8, aged 18 (19 in 4to.); a student of the Middle Temple 1708, rector of Lawrenny, co. Pembroke, 1712. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Ellis, John, s. John, of Llanbeblig, co. Carnarvon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 June, 1707, aged 16; B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714, incorp. at Cambridge 1714; one of these names beneficed in co. Carnarvon. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Powell, John, s. Ant., of Llangan, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Dec., 1707, aged 20; B.A. 1711, M.A. 1717, vicar of Llangenith 1716, and of St. Bride's Major, co. Glamorgan, 1716. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Smith, Richard (Smyth), s. Thomas (1666), of Chirk, co. Denbigh, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 May, 1707, aged 17, B.A. 1711; incorporated at Cambridge 1716, his father vicar of Chirk 1681-1709. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyde, David, s. Phil., of St. Davids, co. Pembroke, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Dec., 1707, aged 19; B.A. 24 March, 1711-12, M.A. 1714; one of these names rector of Kefnllys, co. Radnor, 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Tench, Carbery, s. Rob., of Llanwrin, co. Montgomery, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 Nov., 1707, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 1711, M.A. 1714; rector of Aberhavesp, co. Montgomery, 1728. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Thomas, Christopher, s. Christopher, of Llantrythyd, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Dec., 1707, aged 17, B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714; rector of Reynoldston, co. Glamorgan, 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Thomas, 2s. Edw., of Gwernedith (4to.), co. Brecon, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 Dec., 1707, aged 18, B.A. 1711, died in 1720; brother of Edward 1709.
Jones, Robert, s. John (4to.), of Clocaenog, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 June, 1707, aged 17; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1711.
Griffiths, David, s. Howell, of Llevenock, co. Brecon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1707-8, aged 17; B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714.
Ellis, Thomas, s. Rob., of Llandrillo, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1707-8, aged 17; B.A. 14 March, 1711-12.
Griffith, John, s. Sam., of Llannor, co. Caerm., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1707-8, aged 17; B.A. 1711, as Griffiths.
Owen, Thomas, s. Tho., of Llandrinio, co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1707-8, aged 18, B.A. 1711.
Parry, John, s. Randolph, of Welchpool, co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1707, aged 16; B.A. 1710.
Jones, Edward, s. Dav., of "Mahynlleth" (4to.), co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1707-8, aged 18.
Price, William, s. Roger, of Rhiwlas, co. Merioneth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1707, aged 17. See John 1661.
Williams, Richard, s. Tobias, of Abberbram, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. entry 17 Dec., 1707, aged 14.
Jones, Morris, s. "Joh. Morris", of the isle of Anglesey, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 March, 1707-8, aged 18.
Harris, Thomas, s. Griff., of Caermarthen town, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1707, aged 19; B.A. 1710.
Owen, John, s. John, of Llanystymdwy, co. Carnarvon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Feb., 1707-8, aged 18.
Morgan, Henry, s. H., of Penrose, co. Monmouth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1707, aged 19.
Wynne, Robert, s. R., of Barthe, Devon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 March, 1707-8, aged 17.

Richards, Thomas, s. Ric., of Llanychaiarn (co. Cardigan, 4to.), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1708, aged 19, B.A. 1711, M.A. 1714; rector of Llanfoist, co. Monmouth, 1717-19 (perhaps rector of Newtown, co. Montgomery, 1718-19), of Llanfyllin, co. Montgomery, 1718, canon of St. Asaph 1718, co-portioner of the sinecure rectory of Llansannan, co. Denbigh, 1720-5, and of Pennant, co. Montgomery, 1726-60. See Rawl. iv. 325, xviii. 278; Thomas, 764; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Wynne, William, s. Owen, of Westminster (city), doctoris. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Jan., 1708-9, aged 16, B.A. 1712, M.A. 1723; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1718, serjeant-at-law 1736; author of "Life of Sir Leoline Jenkins"; died 16 May, 1765, buried in Westminster abbey 23rd. See Foster's Judges and Barristers; Woolrych's Serjeants, ii. 543; Chester's West. Abbey Reg. 405; & Rawl. ii. 302, and xxi. 232.

Llwyd, Evan, s. Ev., of Llandyssil, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Oct., 1708, aged 18; B.A. 1712 (as Evans), M.A. 1715, B.D. 1723 (as Evans Llwyd), rector of St. Martins als. Carfax, Oxon, 1720-9, rector of Braunston, Northants, 1728, until his death in 1733; admon. at Oxford 9 Feb., 1732-3. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Phillips, Owen, s. O., of Haverford(west), co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 March, 1708-9, aged 17; B.A. 1712, M.A. 1715; rector of St. Mary Haverfordwest 1718, of Begelly 1721, and of Walwyns Castle 1722, all co. Pembroke. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Humphreys, John, s. J., of Dolgelley, co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1708-9, aged 17; possibly bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1717, bencher 1737 (as son of John of Caerunwch, co. Merioneth). See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Morgan, William, s. Evan, of Llantrissant, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1708, aged 18, B.A. 1712; perhaps vicar of Caldicot, co. Monmouth, 1717, and rector of Pentyrch, co. Glamorgan, 1724. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Hutchins, John, s. Thomas (4to.), of Chedworth, co. Gloucester, pleb. ("Talgarth," co. "Brecon," 4to.). Jesus Coll., matric. 17 June, 1708, aged 19; B.A. 1712 (as William), vicar of Talgarth, co. Brecon, 1721. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, William, s. Joh., of Llanynys, co. Denbigh, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 March, 1708-9, aged 17; B.A. 1712, M.A. 1715; perhaps rector of Llanhychan 1731, and of Llanfwrog, co. Denbigh, 1741. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Humphreys, William (Humffreyes), s. William, of "Gwyddelwern" (4to.), co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 May, 1708, aged 19; B.A. 14 March, 1711-12, vicar of Corwen, co. Merioneth, 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wells, Cradock, s. Nath., of Cardiff, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 Dec., 1708, aged 17, B.A. 11 Feb., 1712-13; vicar of Long Horsley, Northumberland, 1727. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, William, s. Philip, of St. Peter's, co. Card., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 July, 1708, aged 18; B.A. 1712; rector of Llandyssil, co. Cardigan, 1721. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Allen, John s. William, of Gelliswick, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1708, aged 16; of Llanelly, sheriff co. Carmarthen 1734, died 25 May, 1743.
Jones, Hugh, s. Ric., of Little Dewchurch, co. Hereford, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1708-9, aged 17; B.A. 1712, M.A. 1716.
Coytmor, Robert, s. George, of Gavalk, co. Carnarvon (? Gavellia, co. Denbigh), arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Oct., 1708, aged 16.
Jones, John, s. William, of Denbigh town, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Jan., 1708-9, aged 17; perhaps B.A. 18 Feb., 1713-14.
Williams, Hugh, s. Rice, of Mothvey, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 March, 1708-9, aged 18, B.A. 1712.
Bevan, William, s. G. (? Gul), of 'Conhatringl,' co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 July, 1708, aged 16.
Jones, George, s. John, of Llanvinny, co. "Caerm." (4to.), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1708, aged 17.
Parry, John, s. Ric., of Lenthen, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1708-9, aged 17; B.A. 1712.
Jones, Lewis, s. L., of Gilson, co. Glam., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 Dec., 1708, aged 18; B.A. 1712.

Maurice, Peter, s. Peter, of Cerrig-y-Druidion, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 Feb., 1709-10, aged 18; B.A. 1713, M.A. 1716, D.D. Lambeth 7 Nov., 1733, vicar of Llanynys, co. Denbigh, 1718, treasurer of Bangor 1720-7, 1748-50, dean 1727-50, and chancellor 1747-8, canon of Winchester 1740, chaplain to the king; died 2 April, 1750. See Rawl. i. 235; & Thomas, 437.

Hoskyns, John, s. J., of Harewood, co. Hereford, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 17; B.A. 1712, M.A. 1715, rector of Little Marcle, co. Hereford, 1722, and of St. Peterstow 1727 until his death 1 Sept., 1765; he or his son assumed the additional final surname of Abrahall; father of James 1744, of John 1746, and of Leigh 1752. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Edwards, John, s. Lewis, of Towin, co. Montgomery, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 April, 1709, aged 17; B.A. 1712 (perhaps M.A. from Trinity Coll., Cambridge, 1718); one of these names rector of Llanwrin, co. Montgomery, 1729. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Powell, Theophilus, s. Tim., of St. Clare, co. Carmarthen, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 18; B.A. from Christ Church 23 March, 1712-13, M.A. 1717, vicar of Blackwell, and of Merriott, Somerset, 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgann, Walter, s. Jacob, of Manerdivey, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1709-10, aged 18, B.A. 1713, M.A. 1716 (as Morgan), archdeacon of St. Davids 10 Feb., 1731-2; died 28 Feb., 1732. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Thomas, Richard, s. Tho., of Mydrim, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 18, B.A. 1712; M.A. from Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge, 1721; perhaps rector of Llanvigan, co. Brecon, 1724, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Goff, Henry, s. Fran., of St. Davids, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 19; B.A. 23 March, 1712-13, rector of Llanychllwyddog, co. Pembroke, 1718; vicar of Llanrian, 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Estance, Evan, s. How, of Llanbithion, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 16; B.A. 27 Feb., 1712-13; incorporated at Cambridge 1721, and M.A. from King's College 1721, all as Eustance.

Williams, Edward, y.s. Edw(ard), of Gwernevett, co. Brecon, equitis. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Oct., 1709, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1710; died 1715, brother of Thomas 1707. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Davies, Lewis, s. Joh., of Bodedern, Isle of Anglesey, p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 March, 1709-10, aged 19; B.A. 5 Feb., 1713-14, rector of Llandyfrydog, co. Anglesey, 1723. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Bulkeley, Owen, s. Lancelot, of Llanbedr, co. Carnarvon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 May, 1709, aged 19; B.A. 27 Feb., 1712-13, rector of Llangelynin, co. Carnarvon, 1718. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Davids, Richard, s. David, of Llangudock, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1709-10, aged 14; B.A. 1713, M.A. 1716, B.D. 1724 (as Davies). See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Winter, Richard, s. Henr., of Bathwood, co. Radnor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 March, 1709-10, aged 17, B.A. 1713, M.A. 1717; vicar of Boughrood 1720. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, Thomas, s. Rice, of Bangor, co. Flint, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 17; B.A. 1712, M.A. 1715, vicar of Llanasaph, Flints, 1729, See Foster's Index Eccl.
Hyett, Thomas (Hiett), s. Edw., of Bedwest, co. Monmouth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1709, aged 20; called "Huatt" in Mat. Reg., "Hyatt" (4to.); brother of Edward 1700.
Wynne, William, s. William, of Beaumaris, co. Anglesea, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 March, 1709-10, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1716. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Jones, George, s. Dav., of Nevern, co. Pembroke, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 Dec., 1709, aged 18; perhaps rector of Jordanstown, co. Pembroke, 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Fisher, Henry, s. Hen., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 April, 1709, aged 18; B.A. 1714, M.A. 1717, registrar 1737 until his death 18 March, 1761.
Powell, John, s. J., of Cantreff, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1709-10, aged 18; perhaps rector of Cantreff 1720. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Mynors, Robert, s. R., of St. Weonards, co. Hereford, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 Dec., 1709, aged 17; of Treago, high sheriff co. Hereford, 1735; died 10 June, 1742.
Perrott, David, s. Joh., of Llanvihangel, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 March, 1709-10, aged 18, B.A. 3 March, 1713-14.
Jones, John, s. Rice, of Coytchurch, co. Glam., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 April, 1709, aged 20; perhaps B.A. 3 March, 1713-14.
Lloyd, David, s. D., of Llanrwst, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 6 March, 1709-10, aged 17; B.A. 1714. See Thomas, 258.
Roberts, Robert, s. William, of Trenew(?), co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1709, aged 18; B.A. 1713.
Turberville, John, s. Ed(ward), of Landow, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1709, aged 17; died s.p.
Williams, Thomas, s. Tho., of Bryngwyn, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 April, 1709, aged 19, B.A. 10 March, 1712-13.
Morgan, Thomas, s. William, of "Landav," co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1709-10, aged 18.
Phillips, David, s. William, of St. Donatts, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1709, aged 17.
Watkins, Samuel, s. Joh., of Penwordlod, co. Brecon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1709, aged 19.
Williams, Paul, s. Edw., of Llanllfydd, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 May, 1709, aged 17.
Deane, Morgan, s. William, of St. Clement, London, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 June, 1709, aged 17.
Gower, Henry, s. Tho., of Monkland, co. Hereford, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1709, aged 17.

Evans, Simon, s. "Ev. Sym., of Cloakhanmore (? Clocaenog), co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1710, aged 21; B.A. from St. Edmund Hall 1713; perhaps M.A. from Magdalen Coll., Cambridge, 1729, rector of Llandegla, co. Denbigh, 1718-31, vicar of Llanarmon in Yale, co. Denbigh, 1731-53. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Thomas, 626.

Wynn, (Sir) Watkin Williams, s. William Williams, of Llanvorda, Salop, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Dec., 1710, aged 17, created D.C.L. 19 Aug., 1732; 3rd bart.; assumed the additional surname of Wynn; M.P. Denbighshire (June) 1716-34, (Denbigh 1734-41), and 1741, until he died 23 Sept., 1749. See Rawl. vi. 362; & Foster's Baronetage.

Nanney, Richard, s. Rob., of "Cefndauddwr," co. Merioneth. gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1710, aged 19; B.A. 1714, M.A. 1718, vicar of Clynnogvawr, co. Carnarvon, 1719, canon of Bangor 1720, and rector of Llanelhaiarn, co. Carnarvon, 1725. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Scurlock, David, s. Joh., of Carmarthen (town), gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 Oct., 1710, aged 16, B.A. 1714, M.A. 1717; vicar of Waltham St. Lawrence, Berks, 1722, rector of Merthyr, co. Carmarthen, 1723, and vicar of Pottern, Wilts, 1726. See Gutch MS. 259.

Ellis, David, s. Ric., of Llanstingay (? Llanystymdwy) Caernarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1710-11, aged 18; B.A. 1714, M.A. 1717, vicar of Llandinam, co. Montgomery, 1720, rector of Llanengan, co. Carnarvon, 1722. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Price, David, s. Reise, of "Llanychvill Gurdgon" (? Llanychllwydog, co. Pembroke), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 May, 1710, aged 19, B.A. 1714; one of these names vicar of Ragland 1715, and also of Usk 1717, both co. Monmouth. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Jones, Robert, s. "Joh. Roberts", of Llanvair Talhaiarn, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 Feb., 1710-11, aged 21; B.A. 16 March, 1714-15, M.A. 1717; one of these names vicar of Llanidloes, co. Montgomery, 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Gwyn, Leonard, s. Cor., of Llangandwen, co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 June, 1710, aged 17; a student of Lincoln's Inn 1711, as 3rd son of Charles, late of Gwempa, co. Carmarthen, esq., deceased. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Williams, Griffin, s. G., of Llandegwuning, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March. 1710, aged 18, B.A. 1713, M.A. 1716; rector of Meylltyrne, co. Carnarvon, 1729; brother of Herbert. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bean, Thomas, s. Gabriel, of Bean, Anglesea, (?) pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 March, 1710-11, aged 18; B.A. 25 Feb., 1714-15, one of these names rector of Llandegvan, Anglesey, 1720. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Frampton, Robert, s. William, of Llanvayer, co. Monmouth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1710-11, aged 15; B.A. 1714, M.A. 1717, rector of Llanvayer-Kilgeddin, co. Monmouth, 1722. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gwynne, Marmaduke, s. Howell, of Llanhuan, co. Brecon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 May, 1710, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1711; his father of the Garth, Brecon, See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Jones, William, s. Ant., of Carmarthen ("Caarm." town), pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1710, aged 17; B.A. from Christ Church 18 Feb., 1713-14; perhaps M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1718.
Jones, Simon, s. John, of Llangollen, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1710, aged 19; one of these names rector of Llandegla, co. Denbigh, 1737. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Edwards, John, s. Tho., of Llanillo, co. Cardigan, pp. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1710-11, aged 19 (as Edward); B.A. 4 April, 1715; perhaps M.A. from Trinity Coll., Cambridge, 1718.
Williams, John, s. Dav., of Llansillins, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 May, 1710, aged 17; perhaps bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1717. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Meredith, Henry, s. James, of Llanvihangell (town), paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 July, 1710, aged 19; B.A. 1714, rector of Blethvaugh, co. Radnor, 1732. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Rice, Philip, s. Griff., of Newton, co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 14 Nov., 1710, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1710. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Williams, Thomas, s. Edw., of Halkin, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1710, aged 17, B.A. 3 March, 1714-15; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1717.
Howell, Evan, s. Erasm., of Abernant, co. Caermarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1710-11, aged 20; B.A. 3 March, 1714-15; brother of James 1700.
Jones, Samuel, s. Charles, of "Montgome.," gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 March, 1710-11, aged 18; perhaps B.A. from Magdalen Hall 1714. See Rawl. vi. 5.
Broadber, Fortescue, s. William, of Neish (? Neath), co. Glamorgan. Jesus Coll., matric. 22 March, 1710-11, aged 18; B.A. 25 Feb., 1714-15.
Price, Thomas, s. Rog., of Llanvor, co. Merioneth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 March, 1710-11, aged 17; B.A. 1714, M.A. 1717, B.Med. 1725.
Owens, Hugh, s. "Ow. Roberts," of Llannock, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Dec., 1710, aged 18; B.A. 26 Feb., 1714-15.
Evans, Thomas, s. Dav., of Bangor, co. Cardigan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 Oct., 1710, aged 16; B.A. 1714, M.A. 1717.
Davies, James, s. William, of Lampiter, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1710, aged 18; B.A. 1713.
Humberston, William, s. G. (? "Gul."), of Holt, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 March, 1710-11, aged 18.
Myddelton, John, s. J., of Llan Han (? Hamlach), co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1710, aged 18.
Evans, John, s. Corn., of Beaumaris, Isle of Anglesey, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 24 March, 1710-11, aged 19.
Hill, Caleb, s. C., of Lower Sapey, co. Worcester, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1710, aged 24.
Pugh, Thomas, s. T., of Cernchadarn, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 March, 1710, aged 18.
Rogers, Francis, s. Tho., of Carmarthen (town), p.p. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 March, 1710, aged 17.
Morgans, Hugh, s. Tho., of Nantmel, co. Radnor, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 July, 1710, aged 16.

Williams, Robert, s. W(illiam). of "Llanvorda," Salop, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1711, aged 16; of Erbistock, co. Denbigh, bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1718, bencher 1737, M.P. Montgomeryshire, 1727, until unseated April, 1728, (Dec.), 1740, to (April), 1742; died 1763; brother of Thomas 1714. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Parry, Thomas, s. Ric., of Coombe, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 May, 1711, aged 19, B.A. 19 Jan., 1714-15, M.A. 1717; born at Pull Hall, Flints, 29 May, 1692, rector of St. Bridget's, Chester, 1721. See Rawl. xviii. 176; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Howell, Edward, s. E., of Polson, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 May, 1711, aged 17; B.A. 28 Feb., 1715-6, M.A. 1719, rector of Eglwys-Brewis 1721, and of Barry 1732, and of Reynoldstone (all co. Glamorgan), 1746. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Thomas, Morgan, s. Edw., of Colwinstow, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 March, 1711-12, aged 16, B.A. 21 Feb., 1715-16, M.A. 1718; rector of Oxwich 1722, of Lanhary 1736, and of Loughor (all co. Glamorgan), 1738. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Charles, John, s. John, of St. Bride, co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 May, 1711, aged 22; rector of St. Bride's Minor, co. Glamorgan, 1725, his father instituted to rectory of St. Bride's Minor 1696. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Jones, Samuel, s. "Joh. Jenkins", of Brecknock town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 Feb., 1711-12, aged 14; perhaps B.A. from Christ Church 1715, M.A. 1729; rector of St. David's, alias Llanvaes, co. Brecon, 1723. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Morgan, Richard, s. William, of St. Cristollis, Isle of Anglesea, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1711-12, aged 15; possibly student of Middle Temple 1717, his father of Heneglwys, co. Anglesea. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Nanney, John, s. J(ohn), of Aberfrydland, co. Montgomery, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Nov., 1711, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1713; his father of Massypanda, co. Merioneth, esq. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Charles, William, s. Sam., of Lockley, co. Worcester, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1711, aged 17; B.A. 1715, M.A. 1718, vicar of Llansadurn, co. Carmarthen, 1721. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Griffiths, Samuel, s. Howell, of Llanavanvawr, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 May, 1711, aged 18; B.A. 26 Jan., 1714-15, M.A. 1721, vicar of Llanavon, co. Brecon, 1720. See Foster's Index Ecel.
Rogers, John, s. "Rog. Rice," of Coyty, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1711, aged 18; perhaps rector of Newton Nottage, co. Glamorgan, 1720. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, William, s. Henr, of Brecon (town), gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 Feb., 1711-12, aged 17, B.A. 1715; student of Inner Temple 1718. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Jones, Charles, s. C(harles), of Llanmartin, co. Monmouth, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 Oct., 1711, aged 17; a student of Gray's Inn 1712. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Jones, Rice, s. Jenkin, of Devynnock, co. Brecon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Nov., 1711, aged 19, B.A. 1715, M.A. 1718; brother of John 1699.
Stepney, (Sir) John, s. Tho., of Llanelly, co. Carmarthen, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 June, 1711, aged 17; 5th bart.; died 1748.
Thomas, John, s. William, of Carmarthen (town), cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 March, 1711-12, aged 22, B.A. 28 Feb., 1715-16.
Morgan, Philip, s. Evan, of Peterstone, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 May, 1711, aged 19, B.A. 1715.
Bowen, John, s. Owen, of Llannedoe, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 March, 1711-12, aged 16.
Lloyd, Edward, s. Dav., of Llanarth, co. Cardigan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 March, 1711-12, aged 18.
Wynne, Robert, s. Rob., of Llansallen, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 June, 1711, aged 19.

Humphreys, Roger, s. "Hump Jones", of Gwyddelwern, co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1712-3, aged 17; B.A. 1716, M.A. 1719; rector of Stoke Gifford, Somerset, 1728, canon and chancellor of Wells 1728, vicar of Bishops Lydiard, Somerset, 1733; died 11 Jan., 1738-9. See Foster's Index Eccl. See also Robert 1694.

Lloyd, Richard, s. R., of St. Asaph, Flints, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 March, 1712, aged 17; B.A. 9 Feb., 1715-16, M.A. 1718; perhaps rector of Llanbrynmair 1722, and of Llanvihangle, co. Montgomery, 1723, rector of Knockin, Salop, 1727, vicar of Kinnerley, Salop, 1754-9. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 631; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Parry, Stephen, s. Steph., of Llanillar, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 June, 1712, aged 19; B.A. 21 March, 1715-16, vicar of St. Martin, Shrewsbury, 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl. Another of these names M.P. Cardigan 1715, until his death 15 Dec., 1724. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Gibson, James, s. J., of Wootton Underwood, Bucks, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 April, 1712, aged 15; B.A. from Queen's Coll. 9 Feb., 1715-16, M.A. 1718, schoolmaster of Bray, Berks, and curate of Wootton Underwood, rector of Hockerton, Notts, 1722. See Rawl. iv. 326; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Williams, Hugh, s. John, of Glascoed, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 June, 1712, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn 1718 (his father of city of Chester); M.P. co. Anglesea (April) 1725-34; died 18 Jan., 1742. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Jones, Lewis, s. John, of Llanfynnydd, co. Carmar., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 June, 1712, aged 18; B.A. from University Coll. 19 Feb., 1718-19, M.A. 19 June, 1719; perhaps vicar of Merthyr Cynog, co. Brecon, 1723. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Puleston, John, s. J., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 June, 1712, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1714, as son and heir of John, late of Havod-y-wern, co. Denbigh, esq., deceased. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Pruddero, David, s. Roderick David, of Llandilo, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 31 May, 1712, aged 19; B.A. 21 Feb., 1715-16, vicar of Llangenith 1717, and of Colwinstowe, co. Glamorgan, 1741-66. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Phillips, Thomas, s. James, of Skenfrith, co. Monmouth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1712, aged 19; B.A. 1716, M.A. 1719; rector of Llanfoist, co. Monmouth, 1719, etc. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Jones, William, s. Tho., of Wrexham, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 March, 1712-3, aged 18; B.A. 1716, M.A. 1719, rector of Llanferres, co. Denbigh, 1724, etc. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Bowen, Robert, s. Edw., of Aberguilley, co. Carnarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 April, 1712, aged 20, B.A. 28 Feb., 1715-16; incorp. at Cambridge 1733, and M.A. from Trinity Coll. 1733.
Hughes, Robert, s. Rog., of Llanedwan, isle of Anglesey, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1712, aged 18; B.A. 1716; one of these names beneficed in Oxfordshire. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jones, Edward, s. Joh., of Landingad, co. Carmart., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 7 Nov., 1712, aged 16; B.A. 1716, perhaps M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1719.
Rowlands, Griffith, s. G., of Llanvair, co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 Feb., 1712-13, aged 19.
Rowlands, Richard, s. Joh., of Petust, co. Carmarthen, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 Feb., 1712-13, aged 16.
Thomas, Robert, s. William, of Trostrey, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 12 April, 1712, aged 18.
Davies, Morgan, s. Morgan, of 'Comb,' co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 27 June, 1712, aged 14.
Roch, George, s. John, of Robinson, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 March, 1712-13, aged 18.
Davies, William, s. Dav., of Boughrood, co. Radnor, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 8 April, 1712, aged 18.
Jones, John, s. Hector, of Llanelly, co. Carmarth., gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 July, 1712, aged 15.

Mostyn, Roger, s. John, of Castle, co. Montgomery, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1713, aged 17; B.A. 1717, M.A. 1720; sinecure rector of Whitford, co. Flints, 1722, rector of Castle Caereinion, co. Montgomery, 1727 (and of Pickworth, co. Lincoln, 1723-6), until his death 13 July, 1761; his father rector of Castle Caerinion, etc., 1688. See Thomas, St. Asaph, 491; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Wynne, John, s. Ev., of Llanfawr, co. Merioneth, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 29 Jan., 1713-14, aged 18, B.A. 1717, M.A. 1720; of Garthmeilio, cursal canon of St. Asaph 1725, rector of Cerrig-yDruidion, co. Denbigh, 1725, canon of Chester 1727, and sinecure rector of Corwen, co. Merioneth, 1727, rector of Llanymenech, Salop, 1731. See Rawl. ii. 13; & Thomas, 251.

Miles, William, s. John, of Fort Kary (Porthkerry). co. Glamorgan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 15; B.A. 1716, M.A. 1719, vicar of St. Llythans 1721, and of Pendoylan 1721, and of Llantwit-major (all co. Glamorgan), 1735, prebendary of Llandaff 1737-48, and of Sarum 1741-8. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Evans, s. William, of Tanio, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 18; B.A. 21 Feb., 1716-17, M.A. 1719; one of these names vicar of Llansantffraid-yn-Mechan 1725, and of Garthbeibio, co. Montgomery, 1729, and of Kinnerley, Salop, 1735. See Thomas, 631; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Williams, Thomas, s. Henr., of Brecon (town), gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1713-14, aged 16, B.A. 1717, M.A. 1720; vicar of Llanigon 1723-36, of Merthyr Cynog 1736, and of Llywell, (all) co. Brecon, 1741-9, canon of Brecon 1733, See Foster's Index Eccl.

Brynker, James, s. James, of Llanfyhangel, co. Carnarvon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 Oct., 1713, aged 17; B.A. 1717, M.A. 1720, B.D. 1728, rector of Brandeston, Northants, 1733, buried there 6 Oct., 1765, brother of William 1706. See Foster's Index Ecc.

Thomas, "Hemplebey,", s. Joh., of Maken, co. Monmouth, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 17, B.A. 18 March, 1716-17 (as Hompelby); vicar of Whiston 1726, and of Christchurch or Trinity, co. Monmouth, 1726. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Griffiths, Evan, s. Griff., of Llanslovy (?), co. Caernarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 19; B.A. 21 Feb., 1716-17, rector of Penmorfa 1727, etc., and of Llanfihangel-yPennant, co. Carnarvon, 1755-9. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Button, Thomas, of St. Nicholas, co. Glamorgan, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Oct., 1713, aged 17; a student of Lincoln's Inn 1713, as son and heir of Thomas, late of Cotterell, co. Glamorgan, esq., deceased. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Davies, John, s. 'Dav. Jones,' of Ystrad, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-14, aged 19; B.A. from Magdalen Hall 18 March, 1718-19, perhaps rector of Barking, Suffolk, 1722. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Williams, Herbert, s. Griff., of Llandygunoring, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1713-14, aged 16, B.A. 1717, M.A. 1720; rector of Meylltyrne, co. Carnarvon, 1722; brother of Griffin 1710. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Griffith, s. Lewis, of Llanarmon, co. Carmarthen, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 17; B.A. 1716, M.A. 1719; one of these names vicar of Llanfawr, co. Merioneth, 1723. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Hughes, John, s. Sam., of Langharne, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 5 May, 1713, aged 18; B.A. from Worcester Coll. 1718; bar.-at-law, Gray's Inn, 1720. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Mansell, John, s. Edw., of Kidwelly, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-4, aged 17; B.A. 1717, M.A. 1721, vicar of Pembrey, co. Carmarthen, 1728. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, John, s. J., of St. Brides, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-14, aged 19; one of names vicar of Aberavon, co. Glamorgan, 1725, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Morgans, Benjamin, s. Dav., of St. Ismaels, co. Carmarthen, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 July, 1713, aged 19; rector of Tregarron, als. Caron, co. Cardigan, 1717. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Hughes, William, s. Tho., of Aberfraw, co. Anglesea, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 30 June, 1713, aged 20; B.A. 1717, rector of Llantrissaint, co. Anglesey, 1720. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jeffreys, William, s. Evan, of Brecknock, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 19; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 21 Feb., 1717-18, M.A. 1719, as Jefferays; see preceding entry.
Tucker, John, s. J., of Dogwells, co. Pembroke, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1713-14, aged 17, B.A. 1717; rector of Manwrdivey, co. Pembroke, 1721. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Gwynne, Roderick, s. Howel, of Llanavanfawr, co. Brecon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1713, aged 18; bar-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1719. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Lewis, James, s. J., of Gellydowill, co. Carmarthen, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-4, aged 19; a student of Inner Temple 1714. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lloyd, Philip, s. Joh., of Langorse, co. Brecon, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1713, aged 18, B.A. 18 March, 1716-7; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1721.
Fanshawe, Thomas, s. John, of Dagenham, Essex, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 April, 1713, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1716. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Jones, Thomas, s. Howell, of Brecon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 4 July, 1713, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1713. See Foster's Inns of Court Register.
Watkins, John, s. Walter, of Llanverwaladine, Salop, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 March, 1713-14, aged 17; perhaps B.A. 10 March, 1717-18, as Thomas.
Evans, John, s. "Evan David, of Cardigan town, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-14, aged 19; B.A. 21 Feb., 1717-18, M.A. 1722.
Griffith, Owen, s. Rob., of Crickieth (co. Carnarvon), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1713-14, aged 20; B.A. 10 March, 1717-18.
Owen, George, s. G., of Wiston, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1713, aged 17; B.A. 1717, M.A. 19 March, 1720-1.
Edwards, David, s. Morgan, of Troedyraur, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 20 March, 1713-14, aged 17; B.A. 1717.
Bonnell, Thomas, s. Ric., of Pembray, 'Caer,' pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-14, aged 19; B.A. 1717.
Price, William, s. Tho., of "Midnon.," co. Carmarthen, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-14, aged 17.
Jones, Richard, s. Morgan, of Llandilofawr, co. Carmarth., arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1713, aged 17.
Griffith, John, s. J., of Llaniesten, co. Caernarvon, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1713-14, aged 16.
Humphrey, John, s. Hump., of Llanvihangel, co. Carnarvon, paup. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 May, 1713, aged 19.
Powell, Peter (or Piers), of Abergavenny, co. Monmouth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 21 May, 1713, aged 18.
Griffiths, Humphrey, s. Owen, of Bangor, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 19; B.A. 1716.
Ivor, Evan, s. Ev., of Llanwrda, co. Carmarthen, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 19 March, 1713-14, aged 19.
Parry, Love, s. L., of Llanbedrog, co. Carnarvon, arm. Jesus Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1713-14, aged 17.
Pugh, John, s. Edw., of Llangelynin, co. Merioneth, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1713, aged 19.
Weyman, Robert, s. William, of co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1713-14, aged 19.
Jones, John, s. J., of Criccieth, co. Caern., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 18.
Vaughan, Charles, s. Randel, of Llanvyhangel, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 March, 1713, aged 17.
Thomas, Rice, s. Jos., of co. Pembroke, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 3 March, 1713-14, aged 17.
Davies, William, of Carmarthen (town), pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 28 March, 1713, aged 18.

Lewis, Erasmus, s. Griffith, of Nantcwnlle, co. Cardigan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Nov., 1714, aged 19; B.A. from Magdalen Hall 1718; rector of St. Elveis alias Llanelly, co. Pembroke, 1734, and of Llanelidan (1st portion), co. Denbigh, 1749. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Walter(s), Thomas, s. Tho., of St. Athans, co. Glamorgan, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 25 June, 1714, aged 17 (as Walter), B.A. 1718 (as Walters); rector of Gileston 1720-38, of Penmaen 1728-57, and of Port Eynon, (all) co. Glamorgan, 1737-57. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Wynne, Robert, s. Robert (1677), of Gresford, co. Denbigh, doct. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 Aug., 1714, aged 16; of Garthewin, co. Denbigh, bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1721 (his father of Garthewin); died 11 Sept., 1771, aged 94. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Vaughan, William, s. Griffith, of Llanbadernalfren, co. Pembroke, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 15 June, 1714, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 20 March, 1717-18; vicar of Llysyfraen, co. Pembroke, 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Lloyd, Richard, s. David, of Kilkenny, co. Cardigan, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 23 Nov., 1714, aged 17; B.A. 1718; one of these names M.P. Cardigan (May) 1729-41; died 16 July, 1757. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Thomas, Walter, s. Fra., of Llangates (?), co. Car., pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 26 July, 1714, aged 18, B.A. 1718, M.A. 1720; perhaps vicar of Llansadwrn and Llanwrda, co. Carmarthen, 1743. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Roberts, Humphrey, s. Thomas, of Llanneir, co. Carnarvon, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1714, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1714. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Williams, Thomas, s. William, of Oswestry, Salop, bart. Jesus Coll., matric. 2 July, 1714, aged 18, B.A. 15 May, 1718; brother of Robert 1711.
Davies, 'Fulco,' s. Fulco, of Denbigh, co. Denbigh, gent. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 May, 1714, aged 18; B.A. 21 Feb., 1717-18 (as Foulkes).
Brown, Thomas, s. Thomas, of Gresford, co. Denbigh, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 10 Aug., 1714, aged 19; B.A. from St. Edmund Hall 1718.
Griffiths, Rice, s. Rice, of Pembryn, co. Cardigan, cler. Jesus Coll., matric. 13 July, 1714, aged 17; B.A. 1718, M.A. 1724.
Morgans, Roger, s. John, of Llangaffe, co. Anglesea, pleb. Jesus Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1714, aged 17.
